; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $86E0–$874D (code) StageLoader
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

StageLoader:
  $86E0  F0 10     BEQ $86F2 ; StageLoader: loads level-init ptr ($8000[stage]) via JmpThruPtr0 when $30!=0; else uses $801A outer table + SubStageIdx ($42)
  $86E2  A5 41     LDA $41
  $86E4  0A        ASL 
  $86E5  A8        TAY 
  $86E6  B9 00 80  LDA LevelCodePtrs,Y
  $86E9  85 00     STA $00
  $86EB  C8        INY 
  $86EC  B9 00 80  LDA LevelCodePtrs,Y
  $86EF  4C 63 8B  JMP JmpThruPtr0
  $86F2  20 DA 98  JSR DisableRendering
  $86F5  A5 30     LDA $30
  $86F7  D0 53     BNE $874C
  $86F9  A5 41     LDA $41
  $86FB  0A        ASL 
  $86FC  AA        TAX 
  $86FD  BD 1A 80  LDA LevelFormationPtrs,X
  $8700  85 02     STA $02 ; StageLoader sub-stage dispatch: outer ptr=$801A[stage*2]; Y=SubStageIdx-1; inner table ptr[Y*2] called via JmpThruPtr0; first call (Y<0) goes to one-time init at $871C
  $8702  E8        INX 
  $8703  BD 1A 80  LDA LevelFormationPtrs,X
  $8706  85 03     STA $03
  $8708  A4 42     LDY $42
  $870A  E6 42     INC $42
  $870C  88        DEY 
  $870D  30 0D     BMI StageFirstTimeInit
  $870F  98        TYA 
  $8710  0A        ASL 
  $8711  A8        TAY 
  $8712  B1 02     LDA ($02),Y
  $8714  85 00     STA $00
  $8716  C8        INY 
  $8717  B1 02     LDA ($02),Y
  $8719  4C 63 8B  JMP JmpThruPtr0

StageFirstTimeInit:
  $871C  20 E0 98  JSR HideAllSprites ; StageLoader first-time init: JSR $98E0/$98BE; zero ZP $68-$EF; ORA stage flags from $80B6; call $97B1 (palette/init)
  $871F  20 BE 98  JSR ClearNametablesInit
  $8722  A6 41     LDX $41
  $8724  A5 59     LDA $59
  $8726  29 FB     AND #$FB
  $8728  1D B6 80  ORA StageFlagsTable,X
  $872B  85 59     STA $59
  $872D  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $872F  A2 EF     LDX #$EF
  $8731  95 00     STA $00,X
  $8733  CA        DEX 
  $8734  E0 67     CPX #$67
  $8736  D0 F9     BNE $8731
  $8738  20 B1 97  JSR ResetScrollToZero
  $873B  85 12     STA $12
  $873D  85 6B     STA $6B
  $873F  85 13     STA $13
  $8741  85 6C     STA $6C
  $8743  85 FC     STA $FC
  $8745  A9 10     LDA #$10

WritePPUCtrl:
  $8747  8D 00 20  STA $2000 ; WritePPUCtrl: STA $2000; STA $10; RTS — write A to PPU control register and save shadow copy in $10
  $874A  85 10     STA $10
  $874C  60        RTS

; Range $874D–$F239 (code)

Level0Phase_SubState:

  $888A  E6 D1     INC $D1

SoundReset:
  $90C8  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; SoundReset: entry point; LDA #$00 then falls into SoundOff sequence

  $90CA  8D 15 40  STA $4015 ; SoundOff: STA $4015=$00 (disable all APU channels); STA $5D=$5E=$5F=0; STA $0614=$0F

CalcSpeedTiers:
  $96D6  A2 03     LDX #$03 ; CalcSpeedTiers: X=3..0; compute speed tier 5..0 for each entity from $B0
  $96D8  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $96DA  B5 B0     LDA $B0,X
  $96DC  38        SEC 
  $96DD  E9 10     SBC #$10
  $96DF  30 08     BMI $96E9
  $96E1  88        DEY 
  $96E2  F0 05     BEQ $96E9
  $96E4  38        SEC 
  $96E5  E9 08     SBC #$08
  $96E7  10 F8     BPL $96E1
  $96E9  98        TYA 
  $96EA  9D 70 03  STA $0370,X
  $96ED  CA        DEX 
  $96EE  10 E8     BPL $96D8
  $96F0  60        RTS 

FormationDataLoad:
  $96F1  A2 03     LDX #$03 ; FormationDataLoad: X=3..0; for each entity slot read 4 bytes from current stage source via ptr $03/$C0
  $96F3  8A        TXA 
  $96F4  0A        ASL 
  $96F5  0A        ASL 
  $96F6  85 0C     STA $0C
  $96F8  A9 04     LDA #$04
  $96FA  85 0B     STA $0B
  $96FC  20 DE CB  JSR $CBDE
  $96FF  95 C0     STA $C0,X
  $9701  4C 08 97  JMP $9708
  $9704  A4 08     LDY $08
  $9706  B1 03     LDA ($03),Y
  $9708  48        PHA 
  $9709  C8        INY 
  $970A  98        TYA

  $9719  D0 E9     BNE $9704
  $971B  CA        DEX 
  $971C  10 D5     BPL $96F3
  $971E  60        RTS 

HQSpriteInit:
  $971F  A9 56     LDA #$56 ; HQSpriteInit: set $00/$01=$2356(PPU nametable dst); $02/$03=$0400(RAM src); $0400=$17 $0402=$0405=$FB; copy $0409-$040F→$0401-$0407; JMP BuildPPUWriteQueue($992E)
  $9721  85 00     STA $00
  $9723  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $9725  85 01     STA $01
  $9727  A2 06     LDX #$06
  $9729  BD 09 04  LDA $0409,X
  $972C  9D 01 04  STA $0401,X
  $972F  CA        DEX 
  $9730  10 F7     BPL $9729
  $9732  A9 17     LDA #$17
  $9734  8D 00 04  STA $0400
  $9737  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $9739  85 02     STA $02
  $973B  A9 04     LDA #$04
  $973D  85 03     STA $03
  $973F  A9 FB     LDA #$FB
  $9741  8D 02 04  STA $0402
  $9744  8D 05 04  STA $0405
  $9747  4C 2E 99  JMP BuildPPUWriteQueue

PPUQueueHeadInit:
  $974A  A9 12     LDA #$12
  $974C  8D 00 03  STA $0300
  $974F  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $9751  8E 13 03  STX $0313
  $9754  60        RTS 
  $9755  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $9757  20 26 CF  JSR $CF26
  $975A  A2 04     LDX #$04
  $975C  20 26 CF  JSR $CF26
  $975F  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $9761  4C 26 CF  JMP $CF26

LevelScreenInit:
  $9764  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; LevelScreenInit: wait VBlank
  $9767  29 40     AND #$40
  $9769  D0 F9     BNE LevelScreenInit
  $976B  20 D1 97  JSR WritePPUCtrlScroll6B
  $976E  A5 3F     LDA $3F
  $9770  29 03     AND #$03
  $9772  85 61     STA $61
  $9774  20 5A D6  JSR $D65A
  $9777  20 2F D6  JSR $D62F
  $977A  20 C7 D6  JSR $D6C7
  $977D  20 FE D6  JSR $D6FE
  $9780  20 4A 97  JSR PPUQueueHeadInit
  $9783  A9 F8     LDA #$F8
  $9785  A0 EC     LDY #$EC
  $9787  99 00 02  STA $0200,Y
  $978A  88        DEY 
  $978B  88        DEY 
  $978C  88        DEY 
  $978D  88        DEY 
  $978E  D0 F7     BNE $9787

  $979A  88        DEY 
  $979B  D0 FD     BNE $979A
  $979D  CA        DEX 
  $979E  D0 F8     BNE $9798
  $97A0  4C BC 97  JMP WritePPUCtrlScroll12
  $97A3  AD 02 20  LDA $2002
  $97A6  29 40     AND #$40
  $97A8  F0 F9     BEQ $97A3
  $97AA  A5 10     LDA $10
  $97AC  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $97AE  20 47 87  JSR WritePPUCtrl

ResetScrollToZero:
  $97B1  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; ResetScrollToZero: LDA $2002 (reset latch); write #$00 twice to $2005 → scroll(0
  $97B4  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $97B6  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $97B9  4C CD 97  JMP WriteScrollY

WritePPUCtrlScroll12:
  $97BC  A5 10     LDA $10 ; WritePPUCtrlScroll12: STA $2000 from $10 OR $68; LDA $2002; write $12 then $13 to $2005 (X/Y scroll from ZP)
  $97BE  05 68     ORA $68
  $97C0  8D 00 20  STA $2000

WriteScroll12:
  $97C3  AD 02 20  LDA $2002
  $97C6  A5 12     LDA $12
  $97C8  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $97CB  A5 13     LDA $13

WriteScrollY:
  $97CD  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $97D0  60        RTS 

WritePPUCtrlScroll6B:
  $97D1  A5 10     LDA $10 ; WritePPUCtrlScroll6B: STA $2000 from $10 OR $69; LDA $2002; write $6B then $6C to $2005 (X/Y scroll from ZP)
  $97D3  05 69     ORA $69
  $97D5  8D 00 20  STA $2000
  $97D8  AD 02 20  LDA $2002
  $97DB  A5 6B     LDA $6B
  $97DD  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $97E0  A5 6C     LDA $6C
  $97E2  4C CD 97  JMP WriteScrollY

VBlankScrollApply6B:
  $97E5  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; VBlankScrollApply6B: wait $2002 bit7 (VBlank); LDA$10 AND#$FE; JSR$97D3 (PPUCtrl+scroll$6B/$6C); extract $3F bits1-0→$61; delay loop; reconstruct $10→$2000; JMP WriteScroll12
  $97E8  29 80     AND #$80
  $97EA  D0 F9     BNE VBlankScrollApply6B
  $97EC  A5 10     LDA $10
  $97EE  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $97F0  20 D3 97  JSR $97D3
  $97F3  A5 3F     LDA $3F
  $97F5  29 03     AND #$03
  $97F7  85 61     STA $61
  $97F9  A2 70     LDX #$70
  $97FB  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $97FD  88        DEY 
  $97FE  D0 FD     BNE $97FD
  $9800  CA        DEX 
  $9801  D0 F8     BNE $97FB

PPUCtrlRefreshScroll12:
  $9803  A5 10     LDA $10 ; PPUCtrlRefreshScroll12: LDA$10 AND#$7C OR$68→$10→$2000; JMP WriteScroll12($97C3) — per-frame PPU ctrl + scroll refresh
  $9805  29 7C     AND #$7C
  $9807  05 68     ORA $68
  $9809  85 10     STA $10
  $980B  8D 00 20  STA $2000
  $980E  4C C3 97  JMP WriteScroll12

  $9882  85 00     STA $00

  $9887  68        PLA

  $9889  68        PLA 
  $988A  AA        TAX 
  $988B  60        RTS

ClearNametablesInit:
  $98BE  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; ClearNametablesInit: clear $0300+$0301; loop X=1→3: JSR DisableRendering($98DA) + JSR ClearNametableSlot($98EB) for nametables $20/$24/$28
  $98C0  8D 00 03  STA $0300
  $98C3  8D 01 03  STA $0301
  $98C6  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $98C8  8A        TXA 
  $98C9  48        PHA 
  $98CA  85 01     STA $01
  $98CC  20 DA 98  JSR DisableRendering
  $98CF  20 EB 98  JSR ClearNametableSlot
  $98D2  68        PLA 
  $98D3  AA        TAX 
  $98D4  E8        INX 
  $98D5  E0 04     CPX #$04
  $98D7  90 EF     BCC $98C8
  $98D9  60        RTS 

DisableRendering:
  $98DA  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; DisableRendering: LDA #$00 / STA $2001 / RTS — turns off both BG and sprite rendering
  $98DC  8D 01 20  STA $2001
  $98DF  60        RTS 

HideAllSprites:
  $98E0  A9 F8     LDA #$F8 ; HideAllSprites: LDA #$F8 / LDY #$00 / STA $0200
  $98E2  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $98E4  99 00 02  STA $0200,Y
  $98E7  88        DEY 
  $98E8  D0 FA     BNE $98E4
  $98EA  60        RTS 

ClearNametableSlot:
  $98EB  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; ClearNametableSlot: reset PPU latch; clear $10 bit2 → WritePPUCtrl; compute nametable base $1C+(4*$01)→$02; write 1024 bytes of $FC (patterned in bank 1
  $98EE  A5 10     LDA $10
  $98F0  29 FB     AND #$FB
  $98F2  20 47 87  JSR WritePPUCtrl

  $9915  D0 F7     BNE $990E

BuildPPUWriteQueue:
  $992E  8A        TXA  ; BuildPPUWriteQueue: read byte from ($02)[Y]; lo-nibble=row_count; hi-nibble=col_count; write PPU-addr-hi/lo + tile data to $0301+ cmd buffer; advance src by $20 per column group; terminates with $00 sentinel
  $992F  48        PHA 
  $9930  98        TYA 
  $9931  48        PHA 
  $9932  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $9934  B1 02     LDA ($02),Y
  $9936  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $9938  85 05     STA $05
  $993A  B1 02     LDA ($02),Y
  $993C  4A        LSR 
  $993D  4A        LSR 
  $993E  4A        LSR 
  $993F  4A        LSR 
  $9940  85 04     STA $04
  $9942  AE 00 03  LDX $0300
  $9945  A5 01     LDA $01
  $9947  9D 01 03  STA $0301,X
  $994A  20 8A 99  JSR BuildPPUWriteQueueAdvance
  $994D  A5 00     LDA $00
  $994F  9D 01 03  STA $0301,X
  $9952  20 8A 99  JSR BuildPPUWriteQueueAdvance

  $9957  85 06     STA $06
  $9959  9D 01 03  STA $0301,X
  $995C  20 8A 99  JSR BuildPPUWriteQueueAdvance
  $995F  C8        INY 
  $9960  B1 02     LDA ($02),Y

  $9965  C6 06     DEC $06
  $9967  D0 F3     BNE $995C
  $9969  20 8A 99  JSR BuildPPUWriteQueueAdvance

  $998E  90 0A     BCC $999A

ControllerDoubleRead:
  $99D2  A5 14     LDA $14 ; ControllerDoubleRead: latch $4016 high then low (NES strobe); double-reads $4016/$4017 for glitch filter; packs 8 bits into $06 (P1Dir) / $07 (P2Dir); called from $85C0 (title screen) and $8650 (per-frame gameplay)
  $99D4  85 05     STA $05
  $99D6  A5 16     LDA $16
  $99D8  85 06     STA $06
  $99DA  20 23 9A  JSR StrobeControllers

  $99FE  F0 06     BEQ $9A06

  $9A02  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $9A04  85 15     STA $15

  $9A0A  F0 0A     BEQ $9A16

  $9A0E  F0 06     BEQ $9A16

  $BD2B  91 03     STA ($03),Y

MusicSlotReset:
  $BD36  A2 0E     LDX #$0E
  $BD38  A9 FC     LDA #$FC
  $BD3A  9D 04 03  STA $0304,X
  $BD3D  CA        DEX 
  $BD3E  10 FA     BPL $BD3A
  $BD40  60        RTS 

MusicSlotLoad:

  $BD42  B1 05     LDA ($05),Y
  $BD44  9D 04 03  STA $0304,X
  $BD47  E8        INX 
  $BD48  E0 0F     CPX #$0F
  $BD4A  D0 F5     BNE MusicSlotLoad
  $BD4C  60        RTS

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $FFF0–$C000 (hex8) Padding
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $C000–$C070 (hex8) Padding
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  $C000  43        .byte $43
  $C001  4F        .byte $4F
  $C002  50        .byte $50
  $C003  59        .byte $59
  $C004  52        .byte $52
  $C005  49        .byte $49
  $C006  47        .byte $47
  $C007  48        .byte $48
  $C008  54        .byte $54
  $C009  20        .byte $20
  $C00A  31        .byte $31
  $C00B  39        .byte $39
  $C00C  38        .byte $38
  $C00D  31        .byte $31
  $C00E  20        .byte $20
  $C00F  31        .byte $31
  $C010  39        .byte $39
  $C011  38        .byte $38
  $C012  35        .byte $35
  $C013  20        .byte $20
  $C014  4E        .byte $4E
  $C015  41        .byte $41
  $C016  4D        .byte $4D
  $C017  43        .byte $43
  $C018  4F        .byte $4F
  $C019  20        .byte $20
  $C01A  4C        .byte $4C
  $C01B  54        .byte $54
  $C01C  44        .byte $44
  $C01D  2E        .byte $2E
  $C01E  0D        .byte $0D
  $C01F  0A        .byte $0A
  $C020  41        .byte $41
  $C021  4C        .byte $4C
  $C022  4C        .byte $4C
  $C023  20        .byte $20
  $C024  52        .byte $52
  $C025  49        .byte $49
  $C026  47        .byte $47
  $C027  48        .byte $48
  $C028  54        .byte $54
  $C029  53        .byte $53
  $C02A  20        .byte $20
  $C02B  52        .byte $52
  $C02C  45        .byte $45
  $C02D  53        .byte $53
  $C02E  45        .byte $45
  $C02F  52        .byte $52
  $C030  56        .byte $56
  $C031  45        .byte $45
  $C032  44        .byte $44
  $C033  20        .byte $20
  $C034  20        .byte $20
  $C035  20        .byte $20
  $C036  20        .byte $20
  $C037  20        .byte $20
  $C038  20        .byte $20

  $C03C  20        .byte $20

  $C03F  0A        .byte $0A
  $C040  52        .byte $52
  $C041  59        .byte $59
  $C042  4F        .byte $4F
  $C043  55        .byte $55
  $C044  49        .byte $49
  $C045  54        .byte $54
  $C046  49        .byte $49
  $C047  20        .byte $20
  $C048  4F        .byte $4F
  $C049  4F        .byte $4F
  $C04A  4B        .byte $4B
  $C04B  55        .byte $55
  $C04C  42        .byte $42
  $C04D  4F        .byte $4F
  $C04E  20        .byte $20
  $C04F  20        .byte $20
  $C050  54        .byte $54
  $C051  41        .byte $41

  $C053  45        .byte $45
  $C054  46        .byte $46
  $C055  55        .byte $55

  $C058  20        .byte $20
  $C059  48        .byte $48
  $C05A  59        .byte $59

  $C05C  55        .byte $55
  $C05D  44        .byte $44
  $C05E  4F        .byte $4F
  $C05F  55        .byte $55
  $C060  4A        .byte $4A
  $C061  55        .byte $55
  $C062  4E        .byte $4E
  $C063  4B        .byte $4B
  $C064  4F        .byte $4F
  $C065  20        .byte $20
  $C066  4F        .byte $4F
  $C067  5A        .byte $5A
  $C068  41        .byte $41
  $C069  57        .byte $57
  $C06A  41        .byte $41
  $C06B  20        .byte $20
  $C06C  20        .byte $20
  $C06D  20        .byte $20
  $C06E  20        .byte $20
  $C06F  20        .byte $20
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $C070–$D1A7 (code)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Reset:
  $C070  78        SEI  ; SEI; disable interrupts; start of reset handler
  $C071  A9 10     LDA #$10
  $C073  8D 00 20  STA $2000 ; PPU ctrl: NMI off / 8x8 sprites / BG pattern table 1
  $C076  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C078  8D 20 40  STA $4020 ; VS. System register - coin/service I/O
  $C07B  85 4B     STA $4B
  $C07D  D8        CLD 
  $C07E  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; Wait for 1st VBlank
  $C081  10 FB     BPL $C07E
  $C083  A9 06     LDA #$06
  $C085  8D 01 20  STA $2001
  $C088  AD 02 20  LDA $2002 ; Wait for 2nd VBlank
  $C08B  10 FB     BPL $C088
  $C08D  A9 06     LDA #$06
  $C08F  8D 01 20  STA $2001
  $C092  A2 7F     LDX #$7F ; Set stack pointer to $7F (128-byte stack at $0100-$017F)
  $C094  9A        TXS 
  $C095  20 BF D3  JSR Init
  $C098  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C09A  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C09C  85 50     STA $50
  $C09E  A9 B0     LDA #$B0 ; PPU ctrl $B0: NMI enable (bit7) / 8x16 sprite mode (bit5=1) / BG pattern $1000 (bit4) — gameplay PPUCTRL
  $C0A0  8D 00 20  STA $2000
  $C0A3  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C0A6  20 AA CF  JSR PreLoop
  $C0A9  20 96 CF  JSR GameOverScoreScreen
  $C0AC  20 5C C6  JSR MainLoop_2
  $C0AF  20 7B C6  JSR MainLoop_3
  $C0B2  20 89 C3  JSR MainLoop_4
  $C0B5  20 02 C4  JSR GameFrame
  $C0B8  4C A9 C0  JMP $C0A9 ; Main game loop (infinite)
  $C0BB  20 71 D0  JSR StageStartDraw
  $C0BE  20 40 C8  JSR CoinScreen
  $C0C1  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C0C4  20 F6 EB  JSR SoundResetInit
  $C0C7  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C0C9  85 05     STA $05
  $C0CB  A9 6E     LDA #$6E
  $C0CD  85 60     STA $60
  $C0CF  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C0D1  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C0D3  85 50     STA $50
  $C0D5  85 6D     STA $6D
  $C0D7  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C0D9  85 0B     STA $0B
  $C0DB  20 7B D5  JSR $D57B
  $C0DE  20 AD CA  JSR TallyOpenCurtain
  $C0E1  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C0E3  85 6B     STA $6B
  $C0E5  20 B6 C8  JSR $C8B6
  $C0E8  A5 4C     LDA $4C
  $C0EA  F0 03     BEQ $C0EF
  $C0EC  4C 8A C1  JMP GameLoopTop
  $C0EF  A5 06     LDA $06
  $C0F1  29 03     AND #$03
  $C0F3  D0 03     BNE $C0F8
  $C0F5  4C 8A C1  JMP GameLoopTop
  $C0F8  20 B6 C8  JSR $C8B6
  $C0FB  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C0FD  85 12     STA $12
  $C0FF  A9 CD     LDA #$CD
  $C101  85 11     STA $11
  $C103  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $C105  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $C107  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C10A  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C10C  85 12     STA $12
  $C10E  A9 DF     LDA #$DF
  $C110  85 11     STA $11
  $C112  A2 0D     LDX #$0D
  $C114  A0 10     LDY #$10
  $C116  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C119  A9 0A     LDA #$0A
  $C11B  38        SEC 
  $C11C  E5 0A     SBC $0A
  $C11E  20 94 DA  JSR BCD_Div
  $C121  A0 36     LDY #$36
  $C123  A2 0D     LDX #$0D
  $C125  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $C128  A0 10     LDY #$10
  $C12A  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $C12D  A5 0A     LDA $0A
  $C12F  C9 0A     CMP #$0A
  $C131  B0 57     BCS GameLoopTop
  $C133  A5 08     LDA $08
  $C135  05 09     ORA $09
  $C137  29 03     AND #$03
  $C139  D0 4F     BNE GameLoopTop
  $C13B  A5 08     LDA $08
  $C13D  05 09     ORA $09
  $C13F  29 10     AND #$10
  $C141  D0 0E     BNE $C151
  $C143  A5 06     LDA $06
  $C145  05 07     ORA $07
  $C147  29 10     AND #$10
  $C149  F0 15     BEQ $C160
  $C14B  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $C14D  29 07     AND #$07
  $C14F  D0 0F     BNE $C160
  $C151  E6 85     INC $85
  $C153  A5 85     LDA $85
  $C155  C9 24     CMP #$24
  $C157  D0 9F     BNE $C0F8
  $C159  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $C15B  85 85     STA $85
  $C15D  4C F8 C0  JMP $C0F8
  $C160  A5 08     LDA $08
  $C162  05 09     ORA $09
  $C164  29 20     AND #$20
  $C166  D0 14     BNE $C17C
  $C168  A5 06     LDA $06
  $C16A  05 07     ORA $07
  $C16C  29 20     AND #$20
  $C16E  D0 03     BNE $C173
  $C170  4C F8 C0  JMP $C0F8
  $C173  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $C175  29 07     AND #$07
  $C177  F0 03     BEQ $C17C
  $C179  4C F8 C0  JMP $C0F8
  $C17C  C6 85     DEC $85
  $C17E  F0 03     BEQ $C183
  $C180  4C F8 C0  JMP $C0F8
  $C183  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C185  85 85     STA $85
  $C187  4C F8 C0  JMP $C0F8

GameLoopTop:
  $C18A  A9 01     LDA #$01 ; GameLoopTop: JMP target for outer game loop re-entry; jumped to after stage-end or game-over sequence completes to restart per-frame update
  $C18C  8D 01 03  STA $0301
  $C18F  8D 02 03  STA $0302
  $C192  8D 03 03  STA $0303
  $C195  20 30 C8  JSR PreLevelInit
  $C198  A5 85     LDA $85
  $C19A  20 00 F2  JSR LevelTileLoad
  $C19D  20 12 C9  JSR BrickWallInit

StageEndHandler:
  $C1A0  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; StageEndHandler: dispatches on lives/eagle state; calls DrawGameOverScreen($C53E) at $C213 when $4B≠0 (game over); otherwise routes to stage-clear tally
  $C1A2  85 0C     STA $0C
  $C1A4  85 60     STA $60
  $C1A6  85 6B     STA $6B
  $C1A8  20 44 CA  JSR $CA44
  $C1AB  20 CF CA  JSR TallyCloseCurtain
  $C1AE  20 95 D5  JSR $D595
  $C1B1  20 01 C3  JSR ClearAndRespawn
  $C1B4  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C1B7  20 9F C2  JSR GameUpdate2
  $C1BA  20 EF E2  JSR EntityUpdate
  $C1BD  20 8C E1  JSR CollisionUpdate
  $C1C0  20 5A DF  JSR MoveUpdate
  $C1C3  20 2F C6  JSR CheckGameOver
  $C1C6  F0 EC     BEQ $C1B4
  $C1C8  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C1CA  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C1CC  85 0B     STA $0B
  $C1CE  AD 08 01  LDA $0108
  $C1D1  F0 04     BEQ $C1D7
  $C1D3  A9 FE     LDA #$FE
  $C1D5  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C1D7  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C1DA  20 49 C2  JSR InputBlockDuringFlash
  $C1DD  20 9F C2  JSR GameUpdate2
  $C1E0  20 EF E2  JSR EntityUpdate
  $C1E3  20 5A DF  JSR MoveUpdate
  $C1E6  20 8C E1  JSR CollisionUpdate
  $C1E9  20 D9 C2  JSR PaletteFlash
  $C1EC  A5 0A     LDA $0A
  $C1EE  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $C1F0  D0 E5     BNE $C1D7
  $C1F2  20 F6 EB  JSR SoundResetInit
  $C1F5  20 F1 CA  JSR StageClearTallyScreen
  $C1F8  E6 85     INC $85
  $C1FA  A5 51     LDA $51
  $C1FC  18        CLC 
  $C1FD  65 52     ADC $52
  $C1FF  F0 09     BEQ $C20A
  $C201  A5 68     LDA $68
  $C203  C9 80     CMP #$80
  $C205  D0 03     BNE $C20A
  $C207  4C C1 C0  JMP $C0C1
  $C20A  A5 15     LDA $15
  $C20C  05 1D     ORA $1D
  $C20E  F0 03     BEQ $C213
  $C210  20 4D C4  JSR DrawVictoryScreen
  $C213  20 3E C5  JSR DrawGameOverScreen
  $C216  20 F0 D9  JSR CompareAndUpdateHiScore
  $C219  98        TYA 
  $C21A  F0 06     BEQ $C222
  $C21C  20 E9 C4  JSR NewHiScoreDisplay
  $C21F  20 25 C2  JSR GameOverCleanup
  $C222  4C A6 C0  JMP $C0A6

GameOverCleanup:
  $C225  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI ; GameOverCleanup: WaitNMI + ClearSpriteBuf + WriteNametable + Init2; called after NewHiScoreDisplay before JMP $C0A6
  $C228  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $C22B  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C22E  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C231  60        RTS 
  $C232  A5 46     LDA $46
  $C234  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $C236  F0 10     BEQ $C248
  $C238  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C23A  D0 0C     BNE $C248
  $C23C  A5 08     LDA $08
  $C23E  05 09     ORA $09
  $C240  85 08     STA $08
  $C242  A5 06     LDA $06
  $C244  05 07     ORA $07
  $C246  85 06     STA $06
  $C248  60        RTS 

InputBlockDuringFlash:
  $C249  A5 68     LDA $68 ; InputBlockDuringFlash: if $68=$80 (HQ active) skip; else zero $06-$09 (P1Dir/P2Dir/P1Fire/P2Fire) — blocks input during palette-flash game-over animation
  $C24B  C9 80     CMP #$80
  $C24D  F0 0A     BEQ $C259
  $C24F  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C251  85 06     STA $06
  $C253  85 07     STA $07
  $C255  85 08     STA $08
  $C257  85 09     STA $09
  $C259  60        RTS 

NewGameInit:
  $C25A  A2 15     LDX #$15 ; NewGameInit: ZeroSlot at $15
  $C25C  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $C25F  A2 1D     LDX #$1D
  $C261  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $C264  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C266  8D 01 01  STA $0101
  $C269  8D 02 01  STA $0102
  $C26C  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C26E  85 66     STA $66
  $C270  85 67     STA $67
  $C272  85 4C     STA $4C
  $C274  AD 16 40  LDA $4016
  $C277  29 10     AND #$10
  $C279  F0 09     BEQ $C284
  $C27B  A9 05     LDA #$05
  $C27D  85 51     STA $51
  $C27F  85 52     STA $52
  $C281  4C 8A C2  JMP $C28A
  $C284  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $C286  85 51     STA $51
  $C288  85 52     STA $52
  $C28A  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $C28C  85 6A     STA $6A
  $C28E  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C290  D0 04     BNE $C296
  $C292  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C294  85 52     STA $52
  $C296  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C298  85 85     STA $85
  $C29A  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C29C  85 46     STA $46
  $C29E  60        RTS 

GameUpdate2:
  $C29F  20 35 E2  JSR CalcTilePos
  $C2A2  20 32 C2  JSR $C232
  $C2A5  20 23 DC  JSR PlayerInputUpdate
  $C2A8  20 9F DC  JSR EntityMovement
  $C2AB  20 AE E2  JSR ClearTileFlags
  $C2AE  20 E2 E0  JSR BulletUpdate
  $C2B1  20 5D E3  JSR ShovelTimerUpdate
  $C2B4  20 30 E3  JSR PlayerShieldDraw
  $C2B7  20 D6 E1  JSR PlayerFireCheck
  $C2BA  20 16 E2  JSR EnemyFireCheck
  $C2BD  20 F6 DB  JSR EnemySpawnDispatch
  $C2C0  20 A9 E7  JSR BulletMoveCollision
  $C2C3  20 B5 EA  JSR BulletVsBulletCancel
  $C2C6  20 B1 E8  JSR EnemyBulletPlayerHit
  $C2C9  20 17 EB  JSR PowerUpCollision
  $C2CC  20 F8 C7  JSR HUDTankAnimation
  $C2CF  20 B9 DB  JSR CheckPlayersMoving
  $C2D2  20 C5 C6  JSR StartGame

GameUpdate2_end:
  $C2D5  20 D9 C2  JSR PaletteFlash
  $C2D8  60        RTS 

PaletteFlash:
  $C2D9  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $C2DB  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $C2DD  F0 13     BEQ $C2F2
  $C2DF  C9 20     CMP #$20
  $C2E1  D0 1D     BNE $C300
  $C2E3  A9 12     LDA #$12
  $C2E5  A0 06     LDY #$06
  $C2E7  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C2EA  A9 37     LDA #$37
  $C2EC  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $C2EE  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C2F1  60        RTS 
  $C2F2  A9 37     LDA #$37
  $C2F4  A0 06     LDY #$06
  $C2F6  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C2F9  A9 12     LDA #$12
  $C2FB  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $C2FD  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C300  60        RTS 

ClearAndRespawn:
  $C301  20 C6 E4  JSR ClearBulletSlots ; ClearAndRespawn: ClearBulletSlots+ClearEntitySlots; $0106=$F0 $0108=0; if $51>0: PlayerRespawn(X=0 P1); if $52>0: PlayerRespawn(X=1 P2); $7F=$80=$14 timers; $8F=$0A=$45=0
  $C304  20 D0 E4  JSR ClearEntitySlots
  $C307  A9 F0     LDA #$F0
  $C309  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $C30C  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C30E  8D 08 01  STA $0108
  $C311  A5 51     LDA $51
  $C313  F0 05     BEQ $C31A
  $C315  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $C317  20 17 E4  JSR PlayerRespawn
  $C31A  A5 52     LDA $52
  $C31C  F0 05     BEQ $C323
  $C31E  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $C320  20 17 E4  JSR PlayerRespawn
  $C323  A9 14     LDA #$14
  $C325  85 7F     STA $7F
  $C327  85 80     STA $80
  $C329  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C32B  85 8F     STA $8F
  $C32D  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C32F  85 45     STA $45
  $C331  85 6F     STA $6F
  $C333  85 70     STA $70
  $C335  85 89     STA $89
  $C337  85 8A     STA $8A
  $C339  85 82     STA $82
  $C33B  85 86     STA $86

LevelStart:
  $C33D  8D 00 01  STA $0100
  $C340  85 6A     STA $6A
  $C342  20 25 C6  JSR ClearKillTallies
  $C345  20 BD C7  JSR DrawAllHUDKillIcons
  $C348  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C34B  20 2D C7  JSR DrawSidebar1PLabel
  $C34E  20 56 C7  JSR $C756
  $C351  20 E8 E4  JSR SetSpeedPtr
  $C354  A9 80     LDA #$80 ; $68=$80 = GameActive flag set at level start; same ZP used as eagle destruction countdown (1..$7F) and game-over check (0)
  $C356  85 68     STA $68
  $C358  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C35A  8D 12 03  STA $0312
  $C35D  85 4C     STA $4C ; $4C=1: GameSessionActive set at LevelStart — paired with $68=$80; cleared only by NewGameInit($C272); checked at $C0E8 to decide game restart path
  $C35F  A5 46     LDA $46
  $C361  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $C363  D0 05     BNE $C36A
  $C365  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $C367  4C 72 C3  JMP $C372
  $C36A  A5 85     LDA $85
  $C36C  C9 24     CMP #$24
  $C36E  90 02     BCC $C372
  $C370  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $C372  0A        ASL 
  $C373  0A        ASL 
  $C374  85 00     STA $00
  $C376  A9 BE     LDA #$BE
  $C378  38        SEC 
  $C379  E5 00     SBC $00
  $C37B  85 84     STA $84
  $C37D  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C37F  F0 07     BEQ $C388
  $C381  A5 84     LDA $84
  $C383  38        SEC 
  $C384  E9 14     SBC #$14
  $C386  85 84     STA $84
  $C388  60        RTS 

MainLoop_4:
  $C389  AD 17 40  LDA $4017
  $C38C  29 04     AND #$04
  $C38E  D0 07     BNE $C397
  $C390  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C392  85 6D     STA $6D
  $C394  4C 9B C3  JMP $C39B
  $C397  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C399  85 6D     STA $6D
  $C39B  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C39D  85 05     STA $05
  $C39F  20 D3 D5  JSR SetTitlePalette
  $C3A2  20 64 C2  JSR $C264
  $C3A5  A5 51     LDA $51
  $C3A7  85 52     STA $52
  $C3A9  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C3AB  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C3AD  85 50     STA $50
  $C3AF  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C3B1  85 0B     STA $0B
  $C3B3  20 30 C8  JSR PreLevelInit
  $C3B6  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $C3B8  85 85     STA $85
  $C3BA  20 00 F2  JSR LevelTileLoad
  $C3BD  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $C3BF  85 85     STA $85
  $C3C1  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $C3C3  85 46     STA $46
  $C3C5  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI
  $C3C8  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $C3CA  86 56     STX $56
  $C3CC  A0 46     LDY #$46
  $C3CE  84 57     STY $57
  $C3D0  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C3D2  85 14     STA $14
  $C3D4  A9 4F     LDA #$4F
  $C3D6  85 13     STA $13
  $C3D8  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $C3DB  A2 3C     LDX #$3C
  $C3DD  86 56     STX $56
  $C3DF  A0 78     LDY #$78
  $C3E1  84 57     STY $57
  $C3E3  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C3E5  85 14     STA $14
  $C3E7  A9 56     LDA #$56
  $C3E9  85 13     STA $13
  $C3EB  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $C3EE  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C3F1  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C3F4  20 01 C3  JSR ClearAndRespawn
  $C3F7  20 12 C9  JSR BrickWallInit
  $C3FA  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C3FD  A9 05     LDA #$05
  $C3FF  85 6C     STA $6C
  $C401  60        RTS 

GameFrame:
  $C402  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C405  A5 4B     LDA $4B
  $C407  D0 23     BNE GameOverExit
  $C409  20 3F C4  JSR SetHUDSprites
  $C40C  20 A1 C5  JSR GameUpdate1
  $C40F  20 9F C2  JSR GameUpdate2
  $C412  20 EF E2  JSR EntityUpdate
  $C415  20 5A DF  JSR MoveUpdate
  $C418  20 8C E1  JSR CollisionUpdate
  $C41B  20 2F C6  JSR CheckGameOver
  $C41E  F0 E2     BEQ GameFrame
  $C420  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C422  85 0C     STA $0C
  $C424  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C426  85 6D     STA $6D
  $C428  20 F6 EB  JSR SoundResetInit
  $C42B  60        RTS 

GameOverExit:
  $C42C  68        PLA 
  $C42D  68        PLA 
  $C42E  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C430  85 0C     STA $0C
  $C432  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C434  85 6D     STA $6D
  $C436  20 F6 EB  JSR SoundResetInit
  $C439  20 96 CF  JSR GameOverScoreScreen
  $C43C  4C BB C0  JMP $C0BB

SetHUDSprites:
  $C43F  A9 70     LDA #$70
  $C441  8D 05 01  STA $0105
  $C444  A9 70     LDA #$70
  $C446  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $C449  8D 08 01  STA $0108
  $C44C  60        RTS 

DrawVictoryScreen:
  $C44D  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI ; DrawVictoryScreen: final victory (all stages cleared); disable PPU; clear nametables $1C+$24; draw "PEACE BE WITH YOU"(col7 row10) via DrawSprites($D291); draw 9 deco tiles $60-$68(col12 row14) via DrawSprites($D145); draw "NOW LONG WAR"(col10 row7)/"COMES TO"(col12 row10)/"AN END"(col13 row13) via DrawRowTiles; then 240-frame ScrollX slide (INC $4F until $F0); ScrollX=0 ScrollY=2; RTS; called from $C210 when $15|$1D != 0
  $C450  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C452  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C454  85 50     STA $50
  $C456  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $C459  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C45B  85 05     STA $05
  $C45D  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C460  A9 24     LDA #$24
  $C462  85 05     STA $05
  $C464  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C467  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C46A  20 AF D5  JSR SetGamePalette
  $C46D  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C46F  85 12     STA $12
  $C471  A9 91     LDA #$91
  $C473  85 11     STA $11
  $C475  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $C477  A0 0A     LDY #$0A
  $C479  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C47C  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C47E  85 12     STA $12
  $C480  A9 45     LDA #$45
  $C482  85 11     STA $11
  $C484  A2 0C     LDX #$0C
  $C486  A0 0E     LDY #$0E
  $C488  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C48B  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C48E  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C490  85 05     STA $05
  $C492  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C494  85 14     STA $14
  $C496  A9 A4     LDA #$A4
  $C498  85 13     STA $13
  $C49A  A9 0A     LDA #$0A
  $C49C  85 5D     STA $5D
  $C49E  A9 07     LDA #$07
  $C4A0  85 5E     STA $5E
  $C4A2  20 1B D9  JSR DrawRowTiles
  $C4A5  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C4A7  85 14     STA $14
  $C4A9  A9 B1     LDA #$B1
  $C4AB  85 13     STA $13
  $C4AD  A9 0C     LDA #$0C
  $C4AF  85 5D     STA $5D
  $C4B1  A9 0A     LDA #$0A
  $C4B3  85 5E     STA $5E
  $C4B5  20 1B D9  JSR DrawRowTiles
  $C4B8  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C4BA  85 14     STA $14
  $C4BC  A9 BA     LDA #$BA
  $C4BE  85 13     STA $13
  $C4C0  A9 0D     LDA #$0D
  $C4C2  85 5D     STA $5D
  $C4C4  A9 0D     LDA #$0D
  $C4C6  85 5E     STA $5E
  $C4C8  20 1B D9  JSR DrawRowTiles
  $C4CB  A2 F0     LDX #$F0
  $C4CD  20 66 D9  JSR WaitVBlankX
  $C4D0  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C4D3  E6 4F     INC $4F
  $C4D5  A5 4F     LDA $4F
  $C4D7  C9 F0     CMP #$F0
  $C4D9  D0 F5     BNE $C4D0
  $C4DB  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C4DD  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C4DF  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $C4E1  85 50     STA $50
  $C4E3  A2 F0     LDX #$F0
  $C4E5  20 66 D9  JSR WaitVBlankX
  $C4E8  60        RTS 

NewHiScoreDisplay:
  $C4E9  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI ; NewHiScoreDisplay: WaitNMI; NametableId=$1C; DrawX=$10 DrawY=$32 SrcPtr=$D16B→$D8F7 (HI-SCORE label); $D9C4 (draw value); WriteNametable; Init2; timers $0315-$0317=1; loop: WaitVBlank+RNG+QueuePaletteWrite until timers clear
  $C4EC  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C4EE  85 05     STA $05
  $C4F0  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C4F2  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C4F4  85 50     STA $50
  $C4F6  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $C4F9  A2 10     LDX #$10
  $C4FB  86 56     STX $56
  $C4FD  A0 32     LDY #$32
  $C4FF  84 57     STY $57
  $C501  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C503  85 14     STA $14
  $C505  A9 6B     LDA #$6B
  $C507  85 13     STA $13
  $C509  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $C50C  20 C4 D9  JSR DrawHiScoreSprite
  $C50F  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C512  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C515  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C517  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C519  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C51B  8D 15 03  STA $0315
  $C51E  8D 16 03  STA $0316
  $C521  8D 17 03  STA $0317
  $C524  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C527  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $C52A  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $C52C  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $C52E  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C531  AD 15 03  LDA $0315
  $C534  D0 EE     BNE $C524
  $C536  A9 17     LDA #$17
  $C538  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $C53A  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $C53D  60        RTS 

DrawGameOverScreen:
  $C53E  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI ; DrawGameOverScreen: WaitNMI; NametableId=$1C; ScrollX/Y=0; ClearSpriteBuf; draw GAME($D214) at DrawX=$3C DrawY=$46 via $D8F7; draw OVER($D219) at DrawY=$78; WriteNametable; Init2; SetGamePalette; $0318=$0319=$031A=1 (anim timers); wait VBlank until $0318=0; WaitNMI+ClearSpriteBuf+WriteNametable+Init2; RTS
  $C541  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $C543  85 05     STA $05
  $C545  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C547  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C549  85 50     STA $50
  $C54B  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $C54E  A2 3C     LDX #$3C
  $C550  86 56     STX $56
  $C552  A0 46     LDY #$46
  $C554  84 57     STY $57
  $C556  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C558  85 14     STA $14
  $C55A  A9 14     LDA #$14
  $C55C  85 13     STA $13
  $C55E  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $C561  A2 3C     LDX #$3C
  $C563  86 56     STX $56
  $C565  A0 78     LDY #$78
  $C567  84 57     STY $57
  $C569  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C56B  85 14     STA $14
  $C56D  A9 19     LDA #$19
  $C56F  85 13     STA $13
  $C571  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $C574  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C577  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C57A  20 AF D5  JSR SetGamePalette
  $C57D  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C57F  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C581  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C583  8D 18 03  STA $0318
  $C586  8D 19 03  STA $0319
  $C589  8D 1A 03  STA $031A
  $C58C  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C58F  AD 18 03  LDA $0318
  $C592  D0 F8     BNE $C58C
  $C594  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI
  $C597  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $C59A  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $C59D  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $C5A0  60        RTS 

GameUpdate1:
  $C5A1  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C5A3  85 5A     STA $5A
  $C5A5  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $C5A7  A5 86     LDA $86
  $C5A9  F0 12     BEQ $C5BD
  $C5AB  A5 62     LDA $62
  $C5AD  D0 0E     BNE $C5BD
  $C5AF  A5 86     LDA $86
  $C5B1  85 71     STA $71
  $C5B3  A5 87     LDA $87
  $C5B5  85 72     STA $72
  $C5B7  20 56 DE  JSR CalcDirToTarget
  $C5BA  4C 04 C6  JMP $C604
  $C5BD  B5 A2     LDA $A2,X
  $C5BF  10 12     BPL $C5D3
  $C5C1  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $C5C3  B0 0E     BCS $C5D3
  $C5C5  B5 92     LDA $92,X
  $C5C7  85 71     STA $71
  $C5C9  B5 9A     LDA $9A,X
  $C5CB  85 72     STA $72
  $C5CD  20 56 DE  JSR CalcDirToTarget
  $C5D0  4C 04 C6  JMP $C604
  $C5D3  B5 A4     LDA $A4,X
  $C5D5  10 12     BPL $C5E9
  $C5D7  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $C5D9  B0 0E     BCS $C5E9
  $C5DB  B5 94     LDA $94,X
  $C5DD  85 71     STA $71
  $C5DF  B5 9C     LDA $9C,X
  $C5E1  85 72     STA $72
  $C5E3  20 56 DE  JSR CalcDirToTarget
  $C5E6  4C 04 C6  JMP $C604
  $C5E9  B5 A3     LDA $A3,X
  $C5EB  10 12     BPL $C5FF
  $C5ED  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $C5EF  B0 0E     BCS $C5FF
  $C5F1  B5 93     LDA $93,X
  $C5F3  85 71     STA $71
  $C5F5  B5 9B     LDA $9B,X
  $C5F7  85 72     STA $72
  $C5F9  20 56 DE  JSR CalcDirToTarget
  $C5FC  4C 04 C6  JMP $C604
  $C5FF  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C601  4C 0A C6  JMP $C60A
  $C604  29 03     AND #$03
  $C606  A8        TAY 
  $C607  B9 21 C6  LDA $C621,Y
  $C60A  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $C60C  95 06     STA $06,X
  $C60E  95 08     STA $08,X
  $C610  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $C612  C9 C8     CMP #$C8
  $C614  90 06     BCC $C61C
  $C616  B5 08     LDA $08,X
  $C618  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $C61A  95 08     STA $08,X
  $C61C  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $C61E  10 85     BPL $C5A5
  $C620  60        RTS 
  $C621  13 43     SLO ($43),Y
  $C623  23 83     RLA ($83,X)

ClearKillTallies:
  $C625  A2 07     LDX #$07 ; ClearKillTallies: loop X=7..0; STA $73
  $C627  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C629  95 73     STA $73,X
  $C62B  CA        DEX 
  $C62C  10 FB     BPL $C629
  $C62E  60        RTS 

CheckGameOver:
  $C62F  A5 68     LDA $68
  $C631  F0 0B     BEQ SetCenterDeathScroll
  $C633  A5 80     LDA $80
  $C635  F0 1F     BEQ $C656
  $C637  A5 51     LDA $51
  $C639  18        CLC 
  $C63A  65 52     ADC $52
  $C63C  D0 1B     BNE $C659

SetCenterDeathScroll:
  $C63E  A9 70     LDA #$70
  $C640  8D 05 01  STA $0105
  $C643  A9 F0     LDA #$F0
  $C645  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $C648  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C64A  8D 07 01  STA $0107
  $C64D  A9 11     LDA #$11
  $C64F  8D 08 01  STA $0108
  $C652  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C654  85 0B     STA $0B
  $C656  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C658  60        RTS 
  $C659  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C65B  60        RTS 

MainLoop_2:
  $C65C  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; AttractWait: NametableId=$24; INC $4F each frame; call BlinkTitleSprite; exit on $4B!=0 (credits) or $4F=$F0 (240 frames); credits: PLA PLA JMP $C0BB
  $C65E  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C660  85 50     STA $50
  $C662  A9 24     LDA #$24
  $C664  85 05     STA $05
  $C666  20 9A C6  JSR BlinkTitleSprite
  $C669  E6 4F     INC $4F
  $C66B  A5 4B     LDA $4B
  $C66D  D0 07     BNE $C676
  $C66F  A5 4F     LDA $4F
  $C671  C9 F0     CMP #$F0
  $C673  D0 F1     BNE $C666
  $C675  60        RTS 
  $C676  68        PLA 
  $C677  68        PLA 
  $C678  4C BB C0  JMP $C0BB

MainLoop_3:
  $C67B  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C67D  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C67F  85 0B     STA $0B
  $C681  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C683  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $C685  85 50     STA $50
  $C687  20 9A C6  JSR BlinkTitleSprite
  $C68A  A5 4B     LDA $4B
  $C68C  D0 07     BNE $C695
  $C68E  A5 0A     LDA $0A
  $C690  C9 08     CMP #$08
  $C692  D0 F3     BNE $C687
  $C694  60        RTS 
  $C695  68        PLA 
  $C696  68        PLA 
  $C697  4C BB C0  JMP $C0BB

BlinkTitleSprite:
  $C69A  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank ; BlinkTitleSprite: JSR WaitVBlank; test $0B&$20 (frame bit 5 ~1Hz); if set ptr=$D1A7 else ptr=$D1BA; DrawSprites(X=7 Y=$12)
  $C69D  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $C69F  29 20     AND #$20
  $C6A1  F0 12     BEQ $C6B5
  $C6A3  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C6A5  85 12     STA $12
  $C6A7  A9 A7     LDA #$A7
  $C6A9  85 11     STA $11
  $C6AB  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $C6AD  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $C6AF  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C6B2  4C C4 C6  JMP $C6C4
  $C6B5  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C6B7  85 12     STA $12
  $C6B9  A9 BA     LDA #$BA
  $C6BB  85 11     STA $11
  $C6BD  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $C6BF  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $C6C1  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C6C4  60        RTS 

StartGame:
  $C6C5  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C6C7  85 5A     STA $5A
  $C6C9  85 6B     STA $6B
  $C6CB  A9 6E     LDA #$6E
  $C6CD  85 60     STA $60
  $C6CF  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C6D1  85 12     STA $12
  $C6D3  A9 12     LDA #$12
  $C6D5  85 11     STA $11
  $C6D7  A2 1D     LDX #$1D
  $C6D9  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $C6DB  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C6DE  A5 46     LDA $46
  $C6E0  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $C6E2  F0 0B     BEQ $C6EF
  $C6E4  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C6E6  D0 07     BNE $C6EF
  $C6E8  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C6EA  85 5A     STA $5A
  $C6EC  4C FE C6  JMP $C6FE
  $C6EF  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $C6F1  85 12     STA $12
  $C6F3  A9 12     LDA #$12
  $C6F5  85 11     STA $11
  $C6F7  A2 1D     LDX #$1D
  $C6F9  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $C6FB  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $C6FE  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $C700  B5 51     LDA $51,X
  $C702  38        SEC 
  $C703  E9 01     SBC #$01
  $C705  10 02     BPL $C709
  $C707  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C709  20 94 DA  JSR BCD_Div
  $C70C  A0 36     LDY #$36
  $C70E  A2 19     LDX #$19
  $C710  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $C713  A5 5A     LDA $5A
  $C715  85 00     STA $00
  $C717  0A        ASL 
  $C718  18        CLC 
  $C719  65 00     ADC $00
  $C71B  18        CLC 
  $C71C  69 12     ADC #$12
  $C71E  A8        TAY 
  $C71F  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $C722  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $C724  10 D8     BPL $C6FE
  $C726  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C728  85 60     STA $60
  $C72A  85 6B     STA $6B
  $C72C  60        RTS 

DrawSidebar1PLabel:
  $C72D  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $C72F  85 12     STA $12

  $C740  F0 04     BEQ DrawSidebar2PLabel
  $C742  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C744  F0 0F     BEQ $C755

  $C752  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles

HUDKillCounterHelper:
  $C791  48        PHA 
  $C792  29 01     AND #$01
  $C794  18        CLC 
  $C795  69 1D     ADC #$1D
  $C797  AA        TAX 
  $C798  68        PLA 
  $C799  4A        LSR 
  $C79A  18        CLC 
  $C79B  69 03     ADC #$03
  $C79D  A8        TAY 
  $C79E  60        RTS

  $C79F  20 91 C7  JSR HUDKillCounterHelper

  $C7CC  60        RTS 

DrawHUDTanks:
  $C7CD  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $C7CF  85 04     STA $04
  $C7D1  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C7D3  85 6E     STA $6E
  $C7D5  AE 05 01  LDX $0105
  $C7D8  AC 06 01  LDY $0106
  $C7DB  A9 79     LDA #$79
  $C7DD  85 53     STA $53
  $C7DF  20 0A DB  JSR DrawTank
  $C7E2  AD 05 01  LDA $0105
  $C7E5  18        CLC 
  $C7E6  69 10     ADC #$10
  $C7E8  AA        TAX 
  $C7E9  AC 06 01  LDY $0106
  $C7EC  A9 7D     LDA #$7D
  $C7EE  85 53     STA $53
  $C7F0  20 0A DB  JSR DrawTank
  $C7F3  A9 20     LDA #$20
  $C7F5  85 6E     STA $6E
  $C7F7  60        RTS 

HUDTankAnimation:
  $C7F8  AD 08 01  LDA $0108 ; HUDTankAnimation: $0108=enemies-remaining display count (DEC every 16 frames via FrameLo&$0F); when $0108≥$0A: apply D2C6[Y]/D2CA[Y] delta to $0105/$0106 (X/Y position)
  $C7FB  F0 32     BEQ $C82F
  $C7FD  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $C7FF  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $C801  D0 0A     BNE $C80D
  $C803  CE 08 01  DEC $0108
  $C806  D0 05     BNE $C80D
  $C808  A9 F0     LDA #$F0
  $C80A  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $C80D  AD 08 01  LDA $0108
  $C810  C9 0A     CMP #$0A
  $C812  90 18     BCC $C82C
  $C814  AD 07 01  LDA $0107
  $C817  A8        TAY 
  $C818  B9 C6 D2  LDA HUDTankWiggleX,Y
  $C81B  18        CLC 
  $C81C  6D 05 01  ADC $0105
  $C81F  8D 05 01  STA $0105
  $C822  B9 CA D2  LDA HUDTankWiggleY,Y
  $C825  18        CLC 
  $C826  6D 06 01  ADC $0106
  $C829  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $C82C  20 CD C7  JSR DrawHUDTanks
  $C82F  60        RTS 

PreLevelInit:
  $C830  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $C832  85 56     STA $56
  $C834  85 57     STA $57
  $C836  A9 1A     LDA #$1A
  $C838  85 5A     STA $5A
  $C83A  85 5B     STA $5B
  $C83C  20 EC D7  JSR NametableClearAll
  $C83F  60        RTS 

CoinScreen:
  $C840  20 AF D5  JSR SetGamePalette ; CoinScreen: display credits ($4B) each VBlank; wait for P1 fire (bit2 of $08) or P2 fire (bit2 of $09); on press: PLA PLA (discard JSR return) + dispatch via JMP($0011) to TwoPlayerStart/OnePlayerStart
  $C843  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C845  85 0A     STA $0A
  $C847  85 4F     STA $4F
  $C849  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $C84B  85 50     STA $50
  $C84D  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $C84F  85 60     STA $60
  $C851  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C854  A5 4B     LDA $4B
  $C856  20 94 DA  JSR BCD_Div
  $C859  A0 36     LDY #$36
  $C85B  A2 0F     LDX #$0F
  $C85D  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $C860  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $C862  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $C865  A5 09     LDA $09
  $C867  29 04     AND #$04
  $C869  F0 07     BEQ $C872
  $C86B  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $C86D  85 83     STA $83
  $C86F  4C 8B C8  JMP $C88B
  $C872  A5 08     LDA $08
  $C874  29 04     AND #$04
  $C876  F0 D9     BEQ $C851
  $C878  AD 16 40  LDA $4016
  $C87B  29 08     AND #$08
  $C87D  F0 08     BEQ $C887
  $C87F  A5 4B     LDA $4B
  $C881  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $C883  90 CC     BCC $C851
  $C885  C6 4B     DEC $4B
  $C887  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $C889  85 83     STA $83
  $C88B  20 D3 D5  JSR SetTitlePalette
  $C88E  C6 4B     DEC $4B
  $C890  68        PLA 
  $C891  68        PLA 
  $C892  A5 83     LDA $83
  $C894  0A        ASL 
  $C895  A8        TAY 
  $C896  B9 A3 C8  LDA $C8A3,Y
  $C899  85 11     STA $11
  $C89B  B9 A4 C8  LDA $C8A4,Y
  $C89E  85 12     STA $12
  $C8A0  6C 11 00  JMP ($0011)
  $C8A3  A7 C8     LAX $C8
  $C8A5  AC C8 A9  LDY $A9C8
  $C8A8  05 4C     ORA $4C
  $C8AA  AE C8 A9  LDX $A9C8
  $C8AD  07 85     SLO $85
  $C8AF  6C 20 5A  JMP ($5A20)
  $C8B2  C2 4C     NOP #$4C
  $C8B4  C1 C0     CMP ($C0,X)
  $C8B6  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $C8B9  A2 0C     LDX #$0C
  $C8BB  A0 0E     LDY #$0E
  $C8BD  20 FC D5  JSR CalcPPUAddr
  $C8C0  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $C8C2  18        CLC 
  $C8C3  69 1C     ADC #$1C
  $C8C5  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8C8  E8        INX 
  $C8C9  98        TYA 
  $C8CA  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8CD  E8        INX 
  $C8CE  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $C8D0  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8D3  E8        INX 
  $C8D4  A9 24     LDA #$24
  $C8D6  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8D9  E8        INX 
  $C8DA  A9 25     LDA #$25
  $C8DC  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8DF  E8        INX 
  $C8E0  A9 26     LDA #$26
  $C8E2  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8E5  E8        INX 
  $C8E6  A9 27     LDA #$27
  $C8E8  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $C8EB  E8        INX 
  $C8EC  A9 11     LDA #$11
  $C8EE  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X

TallyDrawRowSprite:
  $CA79  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $CA7B  20 FC D5  JSR CalcPPUAddr
  $CA7E  85 12     STA $12
  $CA80  84 11     STY $11
  $CA82  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $CA84  A5 12     LDA $12
  $CA86  18        CLC 
  $CA87  69 1C     ADC #$1C
  $CA89  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $CA8C  E8        INX 
  $CA8D  A5 11     LDA $11
  $CA8F  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $CA92  E8        INX 
  $CA93  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $CA95  A5 63     LDA $63
  $CA97  D0 02     BNE $CA9B
  $CA99  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y
  $CA9B  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $CA9E  E8        INX 
  $CA9F  C8        INY 
  $CAA0  C0 20     CPY #$20
  $CAA2  D0 F1     BNE $CA95
  $CAA4  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $CAA6  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $CAA9  E8        INX 
  $CAAA  86 0C     STX $0C
  $CAAC  60        RTS 

TallyOpenCurtain:
  $CAAD  A9 11     LDA #$11
  $CAAF  85 63     STA $63
  $CAB1  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $CAB3  85 57     STA $57
  $CAB5  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CAB8  A4 57     LDY $57
  $CABA  20 79 CA  JSR TallyDrawRowSprite
  $CABD  A9 1D     LDA #$1D
  $CABF  38        SEC 
  $CAC0  E5 57     SBC $57
  $CAC2  A8        TAY 
  $CAC3  20 79 CA  JSR TallyDrawRowSprite
  $CAC6  E6 57     INC $57
  $CAC8  A5 57     LDA $57
  $CACA  C9 10     CMP #$10
  $CACC  D0 E7     BNE $CAB5
  $CACE  60        RTS 

TallyCloseCurtain:
  $CACF  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $CAD1  85 63     STA $63
  $CAD3  A9 0F     LDA #$0F
  $CAD5  85 57     STA $57
  $CAD7  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CADA  A4 57     LDY $57
  $CADC  20 79 CA  JSR TallyDrawRowSprite
  $CADF  A9 1D     LDA #$1D
  $CAE1  38        SEC 
  $CAE2  E5 57     SBC $57
  $CAE4  A8        TAY 
  $CAE5  20 79 CA  JSR TallyDrawRowSprite
  $CAE8  C6 57     DEC $57
  $CAEA  A5 57     LDA $57
  $CAEC  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $CAEE  D0 E7     BNE $CAD7
  $CAF0  60        RTS 

StageClearTallyScreen:
  $CAF1  20 04 CD  JSR TallyScreenInit ; StageClearTallyScreen: called from $C1F5 after all enemies killed; JSR TallyScreenInit($CD04); sum P1 kills $73-$76→$7D P2 kills $77-$7A→$7E; per-type loop $5A=0-3: load KillScoreTable score SetScoreWeight; drain P1 tally DEC $73
  $CAF4  A2 19     LDX #$19
  $CAF6  20 37 D1  JSR DelayXFrames
  $CAF9  A5 73     LDA $73
  $CAFB  18        CLC 
  $CAFC  65 74     ADC $74
  $CAFE  18        CLC 
  $CAFF  65 75     ADC $75
  $CB01  18        CLC 
  $CB02  65 76     ADC $76
  $CB04  85 7D     STA $7D
  $CB06  A5 77     LDA $77
  $CB08  18        CLC 
  $CB09  65 78     ADC $78
  $CB0B  18        CLC 
  $CB0C  65 79     ADC $79
  $CB0E  18        CLC 
  $CB0F  65 7A     ADC $7A
  $CB11  85 7E     STA $7E
  $CB13  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $CB15  85 5A     STA $5A
  $CB17  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CB1A  20 C4 CE  JSR TallyScreenRowAnim
  $CB1D  A2 25     LDX #$25
  $CB1F  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $CB22  A2 2D     LDX #$2D
  $CB24  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $CB27  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $CB29  85 5D     STA $5D
  $CB2B  85 5E     STA $5E
  $CB2D  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CB30  20 C4 CE  JSR TallyScreenRowAnim
  $CB33  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $CB35  85 7C     STA $7C
  $CB37  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $CB39  BD C2 D2  LDA KillScoreTable,X
  $CB3C  20 62 DA  JSR SetScoreWeight

  $CB41  B5 73     LDA $73,X
  $CB43  F0 18     BEQ $CB5D
  $CB45  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $CB47  8D 13 03  STA $0313
  $CB4A  8D 14 03  STA $0314

  $CD03  60        RTS

  $CDFB  A2 11     LDX #$11
  $CDFD  A0 0F     LDY #$0F
  $CDFF  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE02  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE04  85 12     STA $12
  $CE06  A9 73     LDA #$73
  $CE08  85 11     STA $11
  $CE0A  A2 11     LDX #$11
  $CE0C  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $CE0E  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE11  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE13  85 12     STA $12
  $CE15  A9 73     LDA #$73
  $CE17  85 11     STA $11
  $CE19  A2 11     LDX #$11
  $CE1B  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $CE1D  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE20  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CE23  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE25  85 12     STA $12
  $CE27  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE29  85 11     STA $11
  $CE2B  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $CE2D  A0 0C     LDY #$0C
  $CE2F  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE32  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE34  85 12     STA $12
  $CE36  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE38  85 11     STA $11
  $CE3A  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $CE3C  A0 0F     LDY #$0F
  $CE3E  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE41  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE43  85 12     STA $12
  $CE45  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE47  85 11     STA $11
  $CE49  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $CE4B  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $CE4D  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE50  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE52  85 12     STA $12
  $CE54  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE56  85 11     STA $11
  $CE58  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $CE5A  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $CE5C  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE5F  A5 83     LDA $83
  $CE61  F0 3F     BEQ $CEA2
  $CE63  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CE66  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE68  85 12     STA $12
  $CE6A  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE6C  85 11     STA $11
  $CE6E  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $CE70  A0 0C     LDY #$0C
  $CE72  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE75  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE77  85 12     STA $12
  $CE79  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE7B  85 11     STA $11
  $CE7D  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $CE7F  A0 0F     LDY #$0F
  $CE81  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE84  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE86  85 12     STA $12
  $CE88  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE8A  85 11     STA $11
  $CE8C  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $CE8E  A0 12     LDY #$12
  $CE90  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CE93  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CE95  85 12     STA $12
  $CE97  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $CE99  85 11     STA $11
  $CE9B  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $CE9D  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $CE9F  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CEA2  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $CEA5  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CEA7  85 12     STA $12
  $CEA9  A9 7B     LDA #$7B
  $CEAB  85 11     STA $11
  $CEAD  A2 0C     LDX #$0C
  $CEAF  A0 16     LDY #$16
  $CEB1  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CEB4  A9 D2     LDA #$D2
  $CEB6  85 12     STA $12
  $CEB8  A9 75     LDA #$75
  $CEBA  85 11     STA $11
  $CEBC  A2 06     LDX #$06
  $CEBE  A0 17     LDY #$17
  $CEC0  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CEC3  60        RTS 

TallyScreenRowAnim:
  $CEC4  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $CEC6  85 04     STA $04
  $CEC8  A0 64     LDY #$64
  $CECA  A9 80     LDA #$80
  $CECC  20 3C CF  JSR TallyDrawSprite16
  $CECF  A0 7C     LDY #$7C
  $CED1  A9 A0     LDA #$A0
  $CED3  20 3C CF  JSR TallyDrawSprite16
  $CED6  A0 94     LDY #$94
  $CED8  A9 C0     LDA #$C0
  $CEDA  20 3C CF  JSR TallyDrawSprite16
  $CEDD  A0 AC     LDY #$AC
  $CEDF  A9 E0     LDA #$E0
  $CEE1  20 3C CF  JSR TallyDrawSprite16
  $CEE4  60        RTS 

TallyInitNametable:
  $CEE5  A9 50     LDA #$50
  $CEE7  8D C0 07  STA $07C0
  $CEEA  8D C1 07  STA $07C1
  $CEED  8D C2 07  STA $07C2
  $CEF0  8D C3 07  STA $07C3
  $CEF3  8D C8 07  STA $07C8
  $CEF6  8D C9 07  STA $07C9
  $CEF9  8D CA 07  STA $07CA
  $CEFC  8D CD 07  STA $07CD
  $CEFF  8D CE 07  STA $07CE
  $CF02  8D CF 07  STA $07CF
  $CF05  A9 A0     LDA #$A0
  $CF07  8D C4 07  STA $07C4
  $CF0A  8D C5 07  STA $07C5
  $CF0D  8D C6 07  STA $07C6
  $CF10  8D C7 07  STA $07C7
  $CF13  A9 0A     LDA #$0A
  $CF15  8D D0 07  STA $07D0
  $CF18  8D D1 07  STA $07D1
  $CF1B  8D D2 07  STA $07D2
  $CF1E  8D D5 07  STA $07D5
  $CF21  8D D6 07  STA $07D6
  $CF24  8D D7 07  STA $07D7
  $CF27  A9 05     LDA #$05
  $CF29  8D F0 07  STA $07F0
  $CF2C  8D F1 07  STA $07F1
  $CF2F  8D F2 07  STA $07F2
  $CF32  8D F5 07  STA $07F5
  $CF35  8D F6 07  STA $07F6
  $CF38  8D F7 07  STA $07F7
  $CF3B  60        RTS 

TallyDrawSprite16:
  $CF3C  85 53     STA $53
  $CF3E  A2 81     LDX #$81
  $CF40  20 0A DB  JSR DrawTank
  $CF43  60        RTS 

LivesGrantCheck:
  $CF44  A5 68     LDA $68 ; LivesGrantCheck: if $68=$80 (game active) and P1 score-tier $17≥2 or extra-life flag $66≥1: INC $51(P1Lives)+INC $66; same for P2 ($83/$52/$67); sets $0304=$0305=1 (trigger HUD update)
  $CF46  C9 80     CMP #$80
  $CF48  D0 4B     BNE $CF95
  $CF4A  A5 51     LDA $51
  $CF4C  F0 1D     BEQ $CF6B
  $CF4E  A5 66     LDA $66
  $CF50  D0 06     BNE $CF58
  $CF52  A5 17     LDA $17
  $CF54  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $CF56  B0 0C     BCS $CF64
  $CF58  A5 66     LDA $66
  $CF5A  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $CF5C  D0 0D     BNE $CF6B
  $CF5E  A5 17     LDA $17
  $CF60  C9 07     CMP #$07
  $CF62  90 07     BCC $CF6B
  $CF64  E6 51     INC $51
  $CF66  E6 66     INC $66
  $CF68  4C 8D CF  JMP $CF8D
  $CF6B  A5 83     LDA $83
  $CF6D  F0 26     BEQ $CF95
  $CF6F  A5 52     LDA $52
  $CF71  F0 22     BEQ $CF95
  $CF73  A5 67     LDA $67
  $CF75  D0 06     BNE $CF7D
  $CF77  A5 1F     LDA $1F
  $CF79  C9 02     CMP #$02
  $CF7B  B0 0C     BCS $CF89
  $CF7D  A5 67     LDA $67
  $CF7F  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $CF81  D0 12     BNE $CF95
  $CF83  A5 1F     LDA $1F
  $CF85  C9 07     CMP #$07
  $CF87  90 0C     BCC $CF95
  $CF89  E6 52     INC $52
  $CF8B  E6 67     INC $67
  $CF8D  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $CF8F  8D 04 03  STA $0304
  $CF92  8D 05 03  STA $0305
  $CF95  60        RTS 

GameOverScoreScreen:
  $CF96  20 AF D5  JSR SetGamePalette ; GameOverScoreScreen: attract-loop nametable reset (NOT a score display); SetGamePalette+WaitNMI; NametableId=$1C; ClearSpriteBuf; WriteNametable; Init2; RTS; called at $C0A9 each attract iteration
  $CF99  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI
  $CF9C  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $CF9E  85 05     STA $05
  $CFA0  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $CFA3  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $CFA6  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $CFA9  60        RTS 

PreLoop:
  $CFAA  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI ; PreGameDraw: WaitNMI+ClearSpriteBuf; NametableId=$24; draw nametable blocks; $D7D4+Init2; $60=$30(stage banner); draw STAGE-XX sprite col$02/row$03; draw number; 2P indicator if $83!=0; $60=$00; draw border sprites
  $CFAD  A9 24     LDA #$24
  $CFAF  85 05     STA $05
  $CFB1  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $CFB4  A2 1A     LDX #$1A
  $CFB6  86 56     STX $56
  $CFB8  A0 2E     LDY #$2E
  $CFBA  84 57     STY $57
  $CFBC  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $CFBE  85 14     STA $14
  $CFC0  A9 4F     LDA #$4F
  $CFC2  85 13     STA $13
  $CFC4  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $CFC7  A2 3C     LDX #$3C
  $CFC9  86 56     STX $56
  $CFCB  A0 56     LDY #$56
  $CFCD  84 57     STY $57
  $CFCF  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $CFD1  85 14     STA $14
  $CFD3  A9 56     LDA #$56
  $CFD5  85 13     STA $13
  $CFD7  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $CFDA  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $CFDD  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $CFE0  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $CFE2  85 60     STA $60 ; $60=$30: GameState=StageStart — set by PreLoop/StageStartDraw before showing STAGE XX banner; cleared to $00 once banner display finishes
  $CFE4  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $CFE6  85 12     STA $12
  $CFE8  A9 5B     LDA #$5B
  $CFEA  85 11     STA $11
  $CFEC  A2 02     LDX #$02
  $CFEE  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $CFF0  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $CFF3  A0 16     LDY #$16
  $CFF5  A2 04     LDX #$04
  $CFF7  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $CFFA  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $CFFC  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $CFFF  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D001  85 12     STA $12
  $D003  A9 67     LDA #$67
  $D005  85 11     STA $11
  $D007  A2 0B     LDX #$0B
  $D009  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D00B  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D00E  A0 3E     LDY #$3E
  $D010  A2 0E     LDX #$0E
  $D012  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $D015  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D017  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $D01A  A5 83     LDA $83
  $D01C  F0 1B     BEQ $D039
  $D01E  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D020  85 12     STA $12
  $D022  A9 5E     LDA #$5E
  $D024  85 11     STA $11
  $D026  A2 15     LDX #$15
  $D028  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D02A  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D02D  A0 1E     LDY #$1E
  $D02F  A2 17     LDX #$17
  $D031  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $D034  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D036  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $D039  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D03B  85 60     STA $60
  $D03D  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D040  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D042  85 12     STA $12
  $D044  A9 45     LDA #$45
  $D046  85 11     STA $11
  $D048  A2 0D     LDX #$0D
  $D04A  A0 17     LDY #$17
  $D04C  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D04F  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D051  85 12     STA $12
  $D053  A9 E7     LDA #$E7
  $D055  85 11     STA $11
  $D057  A2 05     LDX #$05
  $D059  A0 19     LDY #$19
  $D05B  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D05E  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D061  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D063  85 12     STA $12
  $D065  A9 FE     LDA #$FE
  $D067  85 11     STA $11
  $D069  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $D06B  A0 1B     LDY #$1B
  $D06D  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D070  60        RTS 

StageStartDraw:
  $D071  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; StageStartDraw: post-game-over stage banner setup; WaitNMI; NametableId=$24; WriteNametable; Init2; $60=$30; draw stage/player-count sprites; same sequence as PreLoop stage-start section
  $D073  85 0C     STA $0C
  $D075  20 A1 D3  JSR WaitNMI
  $D078  A9 24     LDA #$24
  $D07A  85 05     STA $05
  $D07C  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $D07F  20 D4 D7  JSR WriteNametable
  $D082  20 96 D3  JSR Init2
  $D085  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $D087  85 60     STA $60
  $D089  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D08B  85 12     STA $12
  $D08D  A9 5B     LDA #$5B
  $D08F  85 11     STA $11
  $D091  A2 02     LDX #$02
  $D093  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D095  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D098  A0 16     LDY #$16
  $D09A  A2 04     LDX #$04
  $D09C  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $D09F  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D0A1  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $D0A4  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D0A6  85 12     STA $12
  $D0A8  A9 67     LDA #$67
  $D0AA  85 11     STA $11
  $D0AC  A2 0B     LDX #$0B
  $D0AE  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D0B0  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D0B3  A0 3E     LDY #$3E
  $D0B5  A2 0E     LDX #$0E
  $D0B7  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $D0BA  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D0BC  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $D0BF  A5 83     LDA $83
  $D0C1  F0 1B     BEQ $D0DE
  $D0C3  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D0C5  85 12     STA $12
  $D0C7  A9 5E     LDA #$5E
  $D0C9  85 11     STA $11
  $D0CB  A2 15     LDX #$15
  $D0CD  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D0CF  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D0D2  A0 1E     LDY #$1E
  $D0D4  A2 17     LDX #$17
  $D0D6  20 A7 D9  JSR SkipLeadingZeros
  $D0D9  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D0DB  20 FD D6  JSR PPUQueueTilesB
  $D0DE  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D0E0  85 60     STA $60
  $D0E2  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D0E5  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D0E7  85 12     STA $12
  $D0E9  A9 8E     LDA #$8E
  $D0EB  85 11     STA $11
  $D0ED  A2 08     LDX #$08
  $D0EF  A0 11     LDY #$11
  $D0F1  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D0F4  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D0F6  85 12     STA $12
  $D0F8  A9 A0     LDA #$A0
  $D0FA  85 11     STA $11
  $D0FC  A2 0C     LDX #$0C
  $D0FE  A0 15     LDY #$15
  $D100  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D103  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D106  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D108  85 12     STA $12
  $D10A  A9 45     LDA #$45
  $D10C  85 11     STA $11
  $D10E  A2 0D     LDX #$0D
  $D110  A0 17     LDY #$17
  $D112  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D115  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D117  85 12     STA $12
  $D119  A9 E7     LDA #$E7
  $D11B  85 11     STA $11
  $D11D  A2 05     LDX #$05
  $D11F  A0 19     LDY #$19
  $D121  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D124  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D127  A9 D1     LDA #$D1
  $D129  85 12     STA $12
  $D12B  A9 FE     LDA #$FE
  $D12D  85 11     STA $11
  $D12F  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $D131  A0 1B     LDY #$1B
  $D133  20 D3 D6  JSR PPUQueueTiles
  $D136  60        RTS 

DelayXFrames:
  $D137  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank ; DelayXFrames: loop X times: WaitVBlank+TallyScreenRowAnim($CEC4); used during tally to pace per-type counting (X=$19=25 initial wait X=$12=18 between types X=$07=7 X=$0D=13)

Stage5FormationPhase2:
  $D13A  8A        TXA 
  $D13B  48        PHA 
  $D13C  20 C4 CE  JSR TallyScreenRowAnim
  $D13F  68        PLA 
  $D140  AA        TAX 
  $D141  CA        DEX 
  $D142  D0 F3     BNE DelayXFrames
  $D144  60        RTS 

VictorySpritesData:
  $D145  60        RTS  ; VictoryTileData: $D145=9 graphic tiles $60-$68+FF (deco row used by DrawVictoryScreen); $D14F="BATTLE"+FF; $D156="CITY"+FF; tile pairs and "HISCORE"($D16B) strings used by NewHiScoreDisplay
  $D146  61 62     ADC ($62,X)
  $D148  63 64     RRA ($64,X)
  $D14A  65 66     ADC $66
  $D14C  67 68     RRA $68
  $D14E  FF 42 41  ISC $4142,X
  $D151  54 54     NOP $54,X
  $D153  4C 45 FF  JMP $FF45

StrCITY:
  $D156  43 49     SRE ($49,X)
  $D158  54 59     NOP $59,X
  $D15A  FF 5E 6B  ISC $6B5E,X
  $D15D  FF 5F 6B  ISC $6B5F,X
  $D160  FF 58 13  ISC $1358,X
  $D163  FF 5A 13  ISC $135A,X
  $D166  FF 48 49  ISC $4948,X
  $D169  6B        ??? 
  $D16A  FF 48 49  ISC $4948,X
  $D16D  53 43     SRE ($43),Y
  $D16F  4F 52 45  SRE $4552
  $D172  FF 48 49  ISC $4948,X
  $D175  6B        ??? 
  $D176  53 43     SRE ($43),Y
  $D178  4F 52 45  SRE $4552
  $D17B  FF 5E 6B  ISC $6B5E,X
  $D17E  50 4C     BVC $D1CC
  $D180  41 59     EOR ($59,X)
  $D182  45 52     EOR $52
  $D184  FF 5F 6B  ISC $6B5F,X
  $D187  50 4C     BVC $D1D5
  $D189  41 59     EOR ($59,X)
  $D18B  45 52     EOR $52
  $D18D  FF 50 55  ISC $5550,X
  $D190  53 48     SRE ($48),Y
  $D192  20 53 54  JSR $5453
  $D195  41 52     EOR ($52,X)
  $D197  54 20     NOP $20,X
  $D199  42        ??? 
  $D19A  55 54     EOR $54,X
  $D19C  54 4F     NOP $4F,X
  $D19E  4E FF 43  LSR $43FF
  $D1A1  52        ??? 
  $D1A2  45 44     EOR $44
  $D1A4  49 54     EOR #$54
  $D1A6  FF 50 4C  ISC $4C50,X
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $D1A7–$D212 (hex8) TitleStrings
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

TitleStringA:
  $D1A7  50        .byte $50
  $D1A8  4C        .byte $4C
  $D1A9  45        .byte $45
  $D1AA  41        .byte $41
  $D1AB  53        .byte $53

Stage8FormationPhase2:
  $D1AC  45        .byte $45
  $D1AD  20        .byte $20
  $D1AE  49        .byte $49
  $D1AF  4E        .byte $4E
  $D1B0  53        .byte $53
  $D1B1  45        .byte $45
  $D1B2  52        .byte $52
  $D1B3  54        .byte $54
  $D1B4  20        .byte $20
  $D1B5  43        .byte $43
  $D1B6  4F        .byte $4F
  $D1B7  49        .byte $49
  $D1B8  4E        .byte $4E
  $D1B9  FF        .byte $FF

TitleStringB:
  $D1BA  20        .byte $20
  $D1BB  20        .byte $20
  $D1BC  20        .byte $20
  $D1BD  20        .byte $20
  $D1BE  20        .byte $20

Stage8FormationPhase3:
  $D1BF  20        .byte $20
  $D1C0  20        .byte $20

StrPeaceBeWithYou:
  $D291  50 45     BVC $D2D8 ; VictoryMsgData: FF-terminated ASCII strings — $D291="PEACE BE WITH YOU"+$15+FF; $D2A4="NOW LONG WAR"+FF; $D2B1="COMES TO"+FF; $D2BA="AN END"+$69+FF; then anim/palette timing bytes $D2C2-$D2CF

  $D295  45 20     EOR $20
  $D297  42        ??? 
  $D298  45 20     EOR $20
  $D29A  57 49     SRE $49,X
  $D29C  54 48     NOP $48,X
  $D29E  20 59 4F  JSR $4F59

  $D2A6  57 20     SRE $20,X
  $D2A8  4C 4F 4E  JMP $4E4F

  $D2AD  57 41     SRE $41,X

  $D2C1  FF 10 20  ISC $2010,X
  $D2C4  30 40     BMI $D306

HUDTankWiggleX:
  $D2C6  00        BRK  ; HUDTankWiggleX[4]: signed X deltas for HUD tank arrival animation; {0
  $D2C7  FF 00 01  ISC $0100,X

HUDTankWiggleY:

  $D2CD  00        BRK 
  $D2CE  FF FF FF  ISC $FFFF,X

  $D2FE  FF FF 48  ISC $48FF,X
  $D301  8A        TXA 
  $D302  48        PHA 
  $D303  98        TYA 
  $D304  48        PHA 
  $D305  08        PHP 
  $D306  A9 06     LDA #$06 ; Force rendering on during NMI
  $D308  8D 01 20  STA $2001
  $D30B  20 52 D3  JSR NMI_Sub
  $D30E  A5 4D     LDA $4D
  $D310  D0 26     BNE $D338
  $D312  A9 1E     LDA #$1E
  $D314  8D 01 20  STA $2001
  $D317  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D319  8D 03 20  STA $2003
  $D31C  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $D31E  8D 14 40  STA $4014 ; Trigger OAM DMA from page $02
  $D321  AD 02 20  LDA $2002
  $D324  20 6D D9  JSR NMI_Scroll
  $D327  A5 50     LDA $50
  $D329  09 B0     ORA #$B0
  $D32B  8D 00 20  STA $2000
  $D32E  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D330  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $D333  A5 4F     LDA $4F
  $D335  8D 05 20  STA $2005
  $D338  20 8A D6  JSR NMI_Sub2
  $D33B  20 23 EC  JSR SoundEngine
  $D33E  20 22 DB  JSR NMI_Sub4
  $D341  E6 0B     INC $0B ; Increment frame counter low byte (ZP $0B)
  $D343  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $D345  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $D347  D0 02     BNE $D34B
  $D349  E6 0A     INC $0A ; Increment frame counter high byte (ZP $0A)
  $D34B  28        PLP 
  $D34C  68        PLA 
  $D34D  A8        TAY 
  $D34E  68        PLA 
  $D34F  AA        TAX 
  $D350  68        PLA 
  $D351  40        RTI 

NMI_Sub:
  $D352  AD 16 40  LDA $4016 ; VS System coin/service input handler: double-read $4016 (glitch filter); route bit to $4020 (VS protection); AND #$24 (bits 2&5=coin/service buttons); on press INC $4A (CoinHeldCounter); on release INC $4B (credits counter) + $0300=1 (coin event flag) + clear $4A
  $D355  2D 16 40  AND $4016
  $D358  48        PHA 
  $D359  2A        ROL 
  $D35A  2A        ROL 
  $D35B  2A        ROL 
  $D35C  2A        ROL 
  $D35D  29 01     AND #$01
  $D35F  8D 20 40  STA $4020
  $D362  68        PLA 
  $D363  29 24     AND #$24
  $D365  F0 05     BEQ $D36C
  $D367  E6 4A     INC $4A
  $D369  4C 7B D3  JMP $D37B
  $D36C  A5 4A     LDA $4A
  $D36E  F0 0B     BEQ $D37B
  $D370  E6 4B     INC $4B
  $D372  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D374  8D 00 03  STA $0300
  $D377  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D379  85 4A     STA $4A
  $D37B  60        RTS 

RNG:
  $D37C  8A        TXA 
  $D37D  48        PHA 
  $D37E  A5 0F     LDA $0F
  $D380  0A        ASL 
  $D381  0A        ASL 
  $D382  0A        ASL 
  $D383  38        SEC 
  $D384  E5 0F     SBC $0F
  $D386  18        CLC 
  $D387  65 0A     ADC $0A
  $D389  E6 10     INC $10
  $D38B  A6 10     LDX $10
  $D38D  75 00     ADC $00,X
  $D38F  85 0F     STA $0F
  $D391  68        PLA 
  $D392  AA        TAX 
  $D393  A5 0F     LDA $0F
  $D395  60        RTS 

Init2:
  $D396  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D398  85 4D     STA $4D
  $D39A  20 22 DB  JSR NMI_Sub4
  $D39D  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D3A0  60        RTS 

WaitNMI:
  $D3A1  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D3A3  85 4D     STA $4D
  $D3A5  20 22 DB  JSR NMI_Sub4
  $D3A8  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D3AB  60        RTS 

ClearSpriteBuf:
  $D3AC  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D3AE  AA        TAX 
  $D3AF  9D 00 04  STA $0400,X
  $D3B2  9D 00 05  STA $0500,X
  $D3B5  9D 00 06  STA $0600,X
  $D3B8  9D 00 07  STA $0700,X
  $D3BB  E8        INX 
  $D3BC  D0 F1     BNE $D3AF
  $D3BE  60        RTS 

Init:
  $D3BF  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D3C1  85 60     STA $60
  $D3C3  85 6B     STA $6B
  $D3C5  85 0C     STA $0C
  $D3C7  85 0D     STA $0D
  $D3C9  85 6D     STA $6D
  $D3CB  85 4A     STA $4A
  $D3CD  85 4D     STA $4D
  $D3CF  AD 17 40  LDA $4017
  $D3D2  29 C0     AND #$C0
  $D3D4  85 4E     STA $4E
  $D3D6  20 1E D4  JSR InitPalette
  $D3D9  A9 04     LDA #$04
  $D3DB  85 0E     STA $0E

  $D3DF  85 6E     STA $6E
  $D3E1  20 AC D3  JSR ClearSpriteBuf
  $D3E4  20 22 DB  JSR NMI_Sub4
  $D3E7  A2 15     LDX #$15
  $D3E9  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $D3EC  A2 1D     LDX #$1D
  $D3EE  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $D3F1  A2 3D     LDX #$3D
  $D3F3  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $D3F6  A9 02     LDA #$02

  $D41D  60        RTS

  $D41E  20 75 D5  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D421  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $D423  A9 3F     LDA #$3F

  $D428  8E 06 20  STX $2006

  $D431  8D 07 20  STA $2007
  $D434  E8        INX 
  $D435  E0 20     CPX #$20
  $D437  D0 F2     BNE $D42B

  $D43B  8D 06 20  STA $2006

  $D449  60        RTS

WaitVBlank:
  $D575  AD 02 20  LDA $2002
  $D578  10 FB     BPL WaitVBlank
  $D57A  60        RTS 
  $D57B  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D57E  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $D580  20 8E D5  JSR $D58E
  $D583  A0 0B     LDY #$0B
  $D585  20 8E D5  JSR $D58E
  $D588  A0 0F     LDY #$0F
  $D58A  20 8E D5  JSR $D58E
  $D58D  60        RTS 
  $D58E  AD 4D D4  LDA $D44D
  $D591  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D594  60        RTS 
  $D595  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D598  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $D59A  20 A8 D5  JSR $D5A8
  $D59D  A0 0B     LDY #$0B
  $D59F  20 A8 D5  JSR $D5A8
  $D5A2  A0 0F     LDY #$0F
  $D5A4  20 A8 D5  JSR $D5A8
  $D5A7  60        RTS 
  $D5A8  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5AB  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5AE  60        RTS 

SetGamePalette:
  $D5AF  A9 16     LDA #$16
  $D5B1  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $D5B3  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5B6  A9 16     LDA #$16
  $D5B8  A0 02     LDY #$02
  $D5BA  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5BD  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $D5BF  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D5C1  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5C4  A9 16     LDA #$16
  $D5C6  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $D5C8  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5CB  A9 27     LDA #$27
  $D5CD  A0 0B     LDY #$0B
  $D5CF  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5D2  60        RTS 

SetTitlePalette:
  $D5D3  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $D5D5  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5D8  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5DB  A0 02     LDY #$02
  $D5DD  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5E0  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5E3  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $D5E5  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5E8  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5EB  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $D5ED  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5F0  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5F3  A0 0B     LDY #$0B
  $D5F5  B9 4A D4  LDA PaletteData,Y
  $D5F8  20 3E DB  JSR QueuePaletteWrite
  $D5FB  60        RTS 

CalcPPUAddr:
  $D5FC  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D5FE  85 00     STA $00
  $D600  98        TYA 
  $D601  4A        LSR 
  $D602  66 00     ROR $00
  $D604  4A        LSR 
  $D605  66 00     ROR $00
  $D607  4A        LSR 
  $D608  66 00     ROR $00
  $D60A  48        PHA 
  $D60B  8A        TXA 
  $D60C  05 00     ORA $00
  $D60E  A8        TAY 
  $D60F  68        PLA 
  $D610  09 04     ORA #$04
  $D612  60        RTS 
  $D613  20 36 D6  JSR $D636
  $D616  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $D618  A9 23     LDA #$23
  $D61A  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D61D  E8        INX 
  $D61E  98        TYA 
  $D61F  18        CLC 
  $D620  69 C0     ADC #$C0
  $D622  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D625  E8        INX 
  $D626  B9 C0 07  LDA $07C0,Y
  $D629  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X

  $D62D  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $D62F  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D632  E8        INX 
  $D633  86 0C     STX $0C
  $D635  60        RTS 
  $D636  A5 04     LDA $04
  $D638  20 85 D6  JSR $D685
  $D63B  20 85 D6  JSR $D685
  $D63E  20 85 D6  JSR $D685
  $D641  85 02     STA $02
  $D643  98        TYA 
  $D644  29 02     AND #$02
  $D646  D0 0F     BNE $D657
  $D648  8A        TXA 
  $D649  29 02     AND #$02
  $D64B  F0 05     BEQ $D652
  $D64D  A9 F3     LDA #$F3
  $D64F  4C 63 D6  JMP $D663

  $D654  4C 63 D6  JMP $D663
  $D657  8A        TXA 
  $D658  29 02     AND #$02
  $D65A  F0 05     BEQ $D661

  $D65E  4C 63 D6  JMP $D663

  $D665  98        TYA 
  $D666  0A        ASL 
  $D667  29 F8     AND #$F8
  $D669  85 00     STA $00
  $D66B  8A        TXA 
  $D66C  4A        LSR 
  $D66D  4A        LSR 
  $D66E  18        CLC 
  $D66F  65 00     ADC $00
  $D671  A8        TAY 
  $D672  A5 01     LDA $01
  $D674  49 FF     EOR #$FF

  $D678  85 02     STA $02
  $D67A  B9 C0 07  LDA $07C0,Y

  $D67F  05 02     ORA $02
  $D681  99 C0 07  STA $07C0,Y
  $D684  60        RTS 
  $D685  0A        ASL 
  $D686  0A        ASL 
  $D687  05 04     ORA $04
  $D689  60        RTS 

NMI_Sub2:
  $D68A  A6 06     LDX $06
  $D68C  A4 07     LDY $07
  $D68E  86 07     STX $07
  $D690  84 06     STY $06
  $D692  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $D694  8E 16 40  STX $4016
  $D697  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $D699  8C 16 40  STY $4016
  $D69C  94 00     STY $00,X
  $D69E  A0 08     LDY #$08
  $D6A0  BD 16 40  LDA $4016,X
  $D6A3  29 03     AND #$03
  $D6A5  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $D6A7  76 00     ROR $00,X
  $D6A9  EA        NOP 
  $D6AA  EA        NOP 
  $D6AB  88        DEY 
  $D6AC  D0 F2     BNE $D6A0
  $D6AE  CA        DEX 
  $D6AF  10 EB     BPL $D69C
  $D6B1  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $D6B3  B5 06     LDA $06,X
  $D6B5  49 FF     EOR #$FF

  $D6CE  86 09     STX $09
  $D6D0  84 08     STY $08
  $D6D2  60        RTS 

PPUQueueTiles:

  $D6D6  85 14     STA $14
  $D6D8  18        CLC 
  $D6D9  65 05     ADC $05
  $D6DB  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $D6DD  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D6E0  E8        INX

  $D6E2  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X

  $D6E6  85 13     STA $13
  $D6E8  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $D6EA  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y

  $D6F0  C9 FF     CMP #$FF

  $D6FC  60        RTS

PPUAddrFromXY:
  $D726  20 33 D7  JSR PixelToTile
  $D729  20 FC D5  JSR CalcPPUAddr
  $D72C  85 12     STA $12
  $D72E  84 11     STY $11
  $D730  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $D732  60        RTS 

PixelToTile:
  $D733  98        TYA  ; PixelToTileCoord: converts X and Y pixel coords (each 3xLSR /8) to tile indices; returns X=tileX Y=tileY
  $D734  4A        LSR 
  $D735  4A        LSR 
  $D736  4A        LSR 
  $D737  A8        TAY 
  $D738  8A        TXA 
  $D739  4A        LSR 
  $D73A  4A        LSR 
  $D73B  4A        LSR 
  $D73C  AA        TAX 
  $D73D  60        RTS 
  $D73E  86 47     STX $47
  $D740  84 48     STY $48
  $D742  20 26 D7  JSR PPUAddrFromXY
  $D745  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D747  85 00     STA $00
  $D749  A5 48     LDA $48
  $D74B  29 04     AND #$04
  $D74D  F0 04     BEQ $D753
  $D74F  06 00     ASL $00
  $D751  06 00     ASL $00
  $D753  A5 47     LDA $47
  $D755  29 04     AND #$04
  $D757  F0 02     BEQ $D75B
  $D759  06 00     ASL $00
  $D75B  60        RTS 
  $D75C  A5 00     LDA $00
  $D75E  09 F0     ORA #$F0

  $D762  60        RTS 
  $D763  A5 00     LDA $00

  $D767  31 11     AND ($11),Y
  $D769  20 A4 D7  JSR $D7A4
  $D76C  60        RTS

  $D77C  A5 00     LDA $00

  $D783  60        RTS 
  $D784  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y

  $D78A  A5 00     LDA $00
