AdvanceNTPointer:
  $D7CA  18        CLC 
  $D7CB  65 11     ADC $11
  $D7CD  85 11     STA $11
  $D7CF  90 02     BCC $D7D3
  $D7D1  E6 12     INC $12
  $D7D3  60        RTS 

WriteNametable:
  $D7D4  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D7D6  85 11     STA $11
  $D7D8  A8        TAY 
  $D7D9  A9 04     LDA #$04
  $D7DB  85 12     STA $12
  $D7DD  20 91 D7  JSR $D791
  $D7E0  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D7E2  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D7E5  A5 12     LDA $12
  $D7E7  C9 08     CMP #$08
  $D7E9  D0 F2     BNE $D7DD
  $D7EB  60        RTS 

NametableClearAll:
  $D7EC  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $D7EE  A9 11     LDA #$11
  $D7F0  9D 00 04  STA $0400,X
  $D7F3  9D 00 05  STA $0500,X
  $D7F6  9D 00 06  STA $0600,X
  $D7F9  9D 00 07  STA $0700,X
  $D7FC  E8        INX 
  $D7FD  D0 F1     BNE $D7F0
  $D7FF  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D801  A2 C0     LDX #$C0
  $D803  9D 00 07  STA $0700,X
  $D806  E8        INX 
  $D807  D0 FA     BNE $D803
  $D809  A6 56     LDX $56
  $D80B  A4 57     LDY $57
  $D80D  20 FC D5  JSR CalcPPUAddr
  $D810  85 12     STA $12
  $D812  84 11     STY $11
  $D814  A4 5B     LDY $5B
  $D816  88        DEY 
  $D817  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D819  91 11     STA ($11),Y
  $D81B  88        DEY 
  $D81C  10 F9     BPL $D817
  $D81E  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $D820  F0 08     BEQ $D82A
  $D822  A9 20     LDA #$20
  $D824  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D827  4C 14 D8  JMP $D814
  $D82A  60        RTS 

DrawNametableTile:
  $D82B  48        PHA  ; DrawNametableTile(A=tile_type 0-15
  $D82C  85 00     STA $00
  $D82E  20 33 D7  JSR PixelToTile
  $D831  86 47     STX $47
  $D833  84 48     STY $48
  $D835  A4 00     LDY $00
  $D837  B9 69 DB  LDA TileAttrTable,Y
  $D83A  85 04     STA $04
  $D83C  A4 48     LDY $48
  $D83E  20 13 D6  JSR $D613
  $D841  A5 48     LDA $48
  $D843  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $D845  A8        TAY 
  $D846  A5 47     LDA $47
  $D848  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $D84A  AA        TAX 
  $D84B  20 29 D7  JSR $D729
  $D84E  68        PLA 
  $D84F  0A        ASL 
  $D850  0A        ASL 
  $D851  AA        TAX 
  $D852  BD 79 DB  LDA TileCHRTable,X
  $D855  E8        INX 
  $D856  20 A4 D7  JSR $D7A4
  $D859  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D85B  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D85E  BD 79 DB  LDA TileCHRTable,X
  $D861  E8        INX 
  $D862  20 A4 D7  JSR $D7A4
  $D865  A9 1F     LDA #$1F
  $D867  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D86A  BD 79 DB  LDA TileCHRTable,X
  $D86D  E8        INX 
  $D86E  20 A4 D7  JSR $D7A4
  $D871  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D873  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D876  BD 79 DB  LDA TileCHRTable,X
  $D879  E8        INX 
  $D87A  20 A4 D7  JSR $D7A4
  $D87D  60        RTS 

DrawBigSpriteTile:
  $D87E  48        PHA 
  $D87F  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D882  68        PLA 
  $D883  86 5D     STX $5D
  $D885  AA        TAX 
  $D886  98        TYA 
  $D887  18        CLC 
  $D888  69 20     ADC #$20
  $D88A  85 5E     STA $5E
  $D88C  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D88E  85 11     STA $11
  $D890  A9 10     LDA #$10
  $D892  85 12     STA $12
  $D894  CA        DEX 
  $D895  30 08     BMI $D89F
  $D897  A9 10     LDA #$10
  $D899  20 CA D7  JSR AdvanceNTPointer
  $D89C  4C 94 D8  JMP $D894
  $D89F  A5 12     LDA $12
  $D8A1  8D 06 20  STA $2006
  $D8A4  A5 11     LDA $11
  $D8A6  8D 06 20  STA $2006
  $D8A9  AD 07 20  LDA $2007
  $D8AC  A9 08     LDA #$08
  $D8AE  85 5A     STA $5A
  $D8B0  AD 07 20  LDA $2007
  $D8B3  48        PHA 
  $D8B4  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $D8B6  D0 F8     BNE $D8B0
  $D8B8  A9 08     LDA #$08
  $D8BA  85 5A     STA $5A
  $D8BC  68        PLA 
  $D8BD  85 02     STA $02
  $D8BF  A9 80     LDA #$80
  $D8C1  85 03     STA $03
  $D8C3  A6 5D     LDX $5D
  $D8C5  A4 5E     LDY $5E
  $D8C7  20 3E D7  JSR $D73E
  $D8CA  A5 02     LDA $02
  $D8CC  25 03     AND $03
  $D8CE  F0 06     BEQ $D8D6
  $D8D0  20 84 D7  JSR $D784
  $D8D3  4C D9 D8  JMP $D8D9
  $D8D6  20 6D D7  JSR $D76D
  $D8D9  A5 5D     LDA $5D
  $D8DB  18        CLC 
  $D8DC  69 04     ADC #$04
  $D8DE  85 5D     STA $5D
  $D8E0  46 03     LSR $03
  $D8E2  90 DF     BCC $D8C3
  $D8E4  A5 5D     LDA $5D
  $D8E6  38        SEC 
  $D8E7  E9 20     SBC #$20
  $D8E9  85 5D     STA $5D
  $D8EB  A5 5E     LDA $5E
  $D8ED  38        SEC 
  $D8EE  E9 04     SBC #$04
  $D8F0  85 5E     STA $5E
  $D8F2  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $D8F4  D0 C6     BNE $D8BC
  $D8F6  60        RTS 

DrawSpriteString:
  $D8F7  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $D8F9  84 5F     STY $5F
  $D8FB  B1 13     LDA ($13),Y
  $D8FD  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $D8FF  F0 19     BEQ $D91A
  $D901  C8        INY 
  $D902  84 5F     STY $5F
  $D904  A6 56     LDX $56
  $D906  A4 57     LDY $57
  $D908  18        CLC 
  $D909  65 60     ADC $60
  $D90B  20 7E D8  JSR DrawBigSpriteTile
  $D90E  A5 56     LDA $56
  $D910  18        CLC 
  $D911  69 20     ADC #$20
  $D913  85 56     STA $56
  $D915  A4 5F     LDY $5F
  $D917  4C FB D8  JMP $D8FB
  $D91A  60        RTS 

DrawRowTiles:
  $D91B  A0 00     LDY #$00 ; DrawRowTiles: draw byte stream from ($13/$14) ptr horizontally; per non-FF byte: calc PPU addr $D5FC(col=$5D row=$5E); enqueue to PPU queue $0180; INC $5D; set $0313=$0314=1; until FF; RTS
  $D91D  84 5F     STY $5F
  $D91F  A4 5F     LDY $5F
  $D921  B1 13     LDA ($13),Y
  $D923  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $D925  F0 37     BEQ $D95E
  $D927  48        PHA 
  $D928  A6 5D     LDX $5D
  $D92A  A4 5E     LDY $5E
  $D92C  20 FC D5  JSR CalcPPUAddr
  $D92F  18        CLC 
  $D930  65 05     ADC $05
  $D932  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $D934  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D937  E8        INX 
  $D938  98        TYA 
  $D939  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D93C  E8        INX 
  $D93D  68        PLA 
  $D93E  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D941  E8        INX 
  $D942  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $D944  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D947  E8        INX 
  $D948  86 0C     STX $0C
  $D94A  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $D94C  8D 13 03  STA $0313
  $D94F  8D 14 03  STA $0314
  $D952  A2 0C     LDX #$0C
  $D954  20 66 D9  JSR WaitVBlankX
  $D957  E6 5D     INC $5D
  $D959  E6 5F     INC $5F
  $D95B  4C 1F D9  JMP $D91F
  $D95E  60        RTS 

WaitVBlank:
  $D95F  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $D961  C5 0B     CMP $0B
  $D963  F0 FC     BEQ $D961
  $D965  60        RTS 

WaitVBlankX:
  $D966  20 5F D9  JSR WaitVBlank
  $D969  CA        DEX 
  $D96A  D0 FA     BNE WaitVBlankX
  $D96C  60        RTS 

NMI_Scroll:
  $D96D  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $D96F  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D971  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $D974  AA        TAX 
  $D975  E4 0C     CPX $0C
  $D977  F0 26     BEQ $D99F
  $D979  BD 80 01  LDA $0180,X
  $D97C  E8        INX 
  $D97D  8D 06 20  STA $2006
  $D980  BD 80 01  LDA $0180,X
  $D983  E8        INX 
  $D984  8D 06 20  STA $2006
  $D987  BD 80 01  LDA $0180,X
  $D98A  E8        INX 
  $D98B  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $D98D  D0 0A     BNE $D999
  $D98F  BD 80 01  LDA $0180,X
  $D992  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $D994  D0 DF     BNE $D975
  $D996  BD 7F 01  LDA $017F,X
  $D999  8D 07 20  STA $2007
  $D99C  4C 87 D9  JMP $D987
  $D99F  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D9A1  85 0C     STA $0C
  $D9A3  20 39 D4  JSR ResetPPUAddr
  $D9A6  60        RTS 

SkipLeadingZeros:
  $D9A7  B9 00 00  LDA $0000,Y
  $D9AA  D0 05     BNE $D9B1
  $D9AC  C8        INY 
  $D9AD  E8        INX 
  $D9AE  4C A7 D9  JMP SkipLeadingZeros
  $D9B1  C9 FF     CMP #$FF
  $D9B3  D0 08     BNE $D9BD
  $D9B5  A5 6B     LDA $6B
  $D9B7  D0 02     BNE $D9BB
  $D9B9  CA        DEX 
  $D9BA  88        DEY 
  $D9BB  CA        DEX 
  $D9BC  88        DEY 
  $D9BD  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D9BF  85 12     STA $12
  $D9C1  84 11     STY $11
  $D9C3  60        RTS 

DrawHiScoreSprite:
  $D9C4  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $D9C6  85 56     STA $56
  $D9C8  A9 64     LDA #$64
  $D9CA  85 57     STA $57
  $D9CC  A9 30     LDA #$30
  $D9CE  85 60     STA $60
  $D9D0  A0 3E     LDY #$3E
  $D9D2  B9 00 00  LDA $0000,Y
  $D9D5  D0 0B     BNE $D9E2
  $D9D7  C8        INY 
  $D9D8  A5 56     LDA $56
  $D9DA  18        CLC 
  $D9DB  69 20     ADC #$20
  $D9DD  85 56     STA $56
  $D9DF  4C D2 D9  JMP $D9D2
  $D9E2  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D9E4  85 14     STA $14
  $D9E6  84 13     STY $13
  $D9E8  20 F7 D8  JSR DrawSpriteString
  $D9EB  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $D9ED  85 60     STA $60
  $D9EF  60        RTS 

CompareAndUpdateHiScore:
  $D9F0  A2 00     LDX #$00 ; CompareAndUpdateHiScore: compare P1 score ($15-$1B 7 bytes BCD) vs hi-score ($3D-$43); if P1>hi update $3D-$43 Y=1; compare P2 ($1D-$23); if P2>hi update Y=$FF; else Y=0; only caller: $C216
  $D9F2  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $D9F4  B5 15     LDA $15,X
  $D9F6  D5 3D     CMP $3D,X
  $D9F8  D0 08     BNE $DA02
  $D9FA  E8        INX 
  $D9FB  E0 07     CPX #$07
  $D9FD  F0 12     BEQ $DA11
  $D9FF  4C F4 D9  JMP $D9F4
  $DA02  30 0D     BMI $DA11
  $DA04  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $DA06  B5 15     LDA $15,X
  $DA08  95 3D     STA $3D,X
  $DA0A  E8        INX 
  $DA0B  E0 07     CPX #$07
  $DA0D  D0 F7     BNE $DA06
  $DA0F  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $DA11  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $DA13  B5 1D     LDA $1D,X
  $DA15  D5 3D     CMP $3D,X
  $DA17  D0 08     BNE $DA21
  $DA19  E8        INX 
  $DA1A  E0 07     CPX #$07
  $DA1C  F0 12     BEQ $DA30
  $DA1E  4C 13 DA  JMP $DA13
  $DA21  30 0D     BMI $DA30
  $DA23  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $DA25  B5 1D     LDA $1D,X
  $DA27  95 3D     STA $3D,X
  $DA29  E8        INX 
  $DA2A  E0 07     CPX #$07
  $DA2C  D0 F7     BNE $DA25
  $DA2E  A0 FF     LDY #$FF
  $DA30  60        RTS 

ScoreAdd:
  $DA31  8A        TXA  ; ScoreAdd: X=player slot (2=P1
  $DA32  0A        ASL 
  $DA33  0A        ASL 
  $DA34  0A        ASL 
  $DA35  18        CLC 
  $DA36  69 06     ADC #$06
  $DA38  AA        TAX 
  $DA39  A0 06     LDY #$06
  $DA3B  18        CLC 
  $DA3C  B9 35 00  LDA $0035,Y
  $DA3F  75 15     ADC $15,X
  $DA41  C9 0A     CMP #$0A
  $DA43  30 07     BMI $DA4C
  $DA45  38        SEC 
  $DA46  E9 0A     SBC #$0A
  $DA48  38        SEC 
  $DA49  4C 4D DA  JMP $DA4D
  $DA4C  18        CLC 
  $DA4D  95 15     STA $15,X
  $DA4F  CA        DEX 
  $DA50  88        DEY 
  $DA51  10 E9     BPL $DA3C
  $DA53  B5 16     LDA $16,X
  $DA55  F0 0A     BEQ $DA61
  $DA57  A9 09     LDA #$09
  $DA59  95 17     STA $17,X
  $DA5B  95 18     STA $18,X
  $DA5D  95 19     STA $19,X
  $DA5F  95 1A     STA $1A,X
  $DA61  60        RTS 

SetScoreWeight:
  $DA62  85 00     STA $00 ; SetScoreWeight: A=nibble-BCD value; ZeroSlot at $35; A!=0: $3A=A>>4(hi tens) $3B=A&$0F(lo units); A==0: $38=1(free tank flag)
  $DA64  A2 35     LDX #$35
  $DA66  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $DA69  A5 00     LDA $00
  $DA6B  F0 0D     BEQ $DA7A
  $DA6D  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $DA6F  85 3A     STA $3A
  $DA71  A5 00     LDA $00
  $DA73  4A        LSR 
  $DA74  4A        LSR 
  $DA75  4A        LSR 
  $DA76  4A        LSR 
  $DA77  85 39     STA $39
  $DA79  60        RTS 
  $DA7A  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DA7C  85 38     STA $38
  $DA7E  60        RTS 

ZeroSlot:
  $DA7F  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DA81  95 00     STA $00,X
  $DA83  95 01     STA $01,X
  $DA85  95 02     STA $02,X
  $DA87  95 03     STA $03,X
  $DA89  95 04     STA $04,X
  $DA8B  95 05     STA $05,X
  $DA8D  95 06     STA $06,X
  $DA8F  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $DA91  95 07     STA $07,X
  $DA93  60        RTS 

BCD_Div:
  $DA94  85 00     STA $00
  $DA96  A2 35     LDX #$35
  $DA98  20 7F DA  JSR ZeroSlot
  $DA9B  A5 00     LDA $00
  $DA9D  C9 0A     CMP #$0A
  $DA9F  90 08     BCC $DAA9
  $DAA1  38        SEC 
  $DAA2  E9 0A     SBC #$0A
  $DAA4  E6 3A     INC $3A
  $DAA6  4C 9D DA  JMP $DA9D
  $DAA9  85 3B     STA $3B
  $DAAB  A5 3A     LDA $3A
  $DAAD  C9 0A     CMP #$0A
  $DAAF  90 08     BCC $DAB9
  $DAB1  38        SEC 
  $DAB2  E9 0A     SBC #$0A
  $DAB4  85 3A     STA $3A
  $DAB6  4C AD DA  JMP $DAAD
  $DAB9  60        RTS 

DrawEntityTile:
  $DABA  8A        TXA 
  $DABB  85 47     STA $47
  $DABD  18        CLC 
  $DABE  69 03     ADC #$03
  $DAC0  AA        TAX 
  $DAC1  98        TYA 
  $DAC2  38        SEC 
  $DAC3  E9 08     SBC #$08
  $DAC5  85 48     STA $48
  $DAC7  20 26 D7  JSR PPUAddrFromXY
  $DACA  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y
  $DACC  C9 22     CMP #$22
  $DACE  D0 06     BNE $DAD6
  $DAD0  A5 04     LDA $04
  $DAD2  05 6E     ORA $6E
  $DAD4  85 04     STA $04
  $DAD6  A6 0D     LDX $0D
  $DAD8  A5 48     LDA $48
  $DADA  9D 00 02  STA $0200,X
  $DADD  A5 53     LDA $53
  $DADF  9D 01 02  STA $0201,X
  $DAE2  A5 04     LDA $04
  $DAE4  9D 02 02  STA $0202,X
  $DAE7  A5 47     LDA $47
  $DAE9  9D 03 02  STA $0203,X
  $DAEC  8A        TXA 
  $DAED  18        CLC 
  $DAEE  65 0E     ADC $0E
  $DAF0  85 0D     STA $0D
  $DAF2  60        RTS 

BulletExplosionDraw:
  $DAF3  0A        ASL  ; BulletExplode helper: encodes dir into tile offset; adjusts X by -5; calls DrawEntityTile
  $DAF4  18        CLC 
  $DAF5  65 53     ADC $53
  $DAF7  85 53     STA $53
  $DAF9  8A        TXA 
  $DAFA  38        SEC 
  $DAFB  E9 05     SBC #$05
  $DAFD  AA        TAX 
  $DAFE  20 BA DA  JSR DrawEntityTile
  $DB01  60        RTS 

DrawTank2x2:
  $DB02  0A        ASL 
  $DB03  0A        ASL 
  $DB04  0A        ASL 
  $DB05  18        CLC 
  $DB06  65 53     ADC $53
  $DB08  85 53     STA $53

DrawTank:
  $DB0A  86 54     STX $54
  $DB0C  84 55     STY $55
  $DB0E  8A        TXA 
  $DB0F  38        SEC 
  $DB10  E9 08     SBC #$08
  $DB12  AA        TAX 
  $DB13  20 BA DA  JSR DrawEntityTile
  $DB16  E6 53     INC $53
  $DB18  E6 53     INC $53
  $DB1A  A6 54     LDX $54
  $DB1C  A4 55     LDY $55
  $DB1E  20 BA DA  JSR DrawEntityTile
  $DB21  60        RTS 

NMI_Sub4:
  $DB22  A6 0D     LDX $0D
  $DB24  A5 0E     LDA $0E
  $DB26  49 FF     EOR #$FF
  $DB28  18        CLC 
  $DB29  69 01     ADC #$01
  $DB2B  85 0E     STA $0E
  $DB2D  8A        TXA 
  $DB2E  18        CLC 
  $DB2F  65 0E     ADC $0E
  $DB31  AA        TAX 
  $DB32  A9 F0     LDA #$F0
  $DB34  9D 00 02  STA $0200,X
  $DB37  E0 04     CPX #$04
  $DB39  D0 F2     BNE $DB2D
  $DB3B  86 0D     STX $0D
  $DB3D  60        RTS 

QueuePaletteWrite:
  $DB3E  20 6A D4  JSR PaletteApplyDIP
  $DB41  A6 0C     LDX $0C
  $DB43  48        PHA 
  $DB44  A9 3F     LDA #$3F
  $DB46  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $DB49  E8        INX 
  $DB4A  98        TYA 
  $DB4B  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $DB4E  E8        INX 
  $DB4F  68        PLA 
  $DB50  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $DB53  E8        INX 
  $DB54  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $DB56  9D 80 01  STA $0180,X
  $DB59  E8        INX 
  $DB5A  86 0C     STX $0C
  $DB5C  60        RTS 

SignFn:
  $DB5D  F0 09     BEQ $DB68
  $DB5F  B0 05     BCS $DB66
  $DB61  A9 FF     LDA #$FF
  $DB63  4C 68 DB  JMP $DB68
  $DB66  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DB68  60        RTS 

TileAttrTable:
  $DB69  00        BRK  ; TileAttrTable[16]: palette slot (0-3) per metatile type; types 0-4=pal0(open/brick)
  $DB6A  00        BRK 
  $DB6B  00        BRK 
  $DB6C  00        BRK 
  $DB6D  00        BRK 
  $DB6E  03 03     SLO ($03,X)
  $DB70  03 03     SLO ($03,X)
  $DB72  03 01     SLO ($01,X)
  $DB74  02        ??? 
  $DB75  03 00     SLO ($00,X)
  $DB77  00        BRK 
  $DB78  00        BRK 

TileCHRTable:
  $DB79  00        BRK  ; TileCHRTable[16*4]: 4 CHR tile IDs (TL TR BL BR) per 2x2 metatile type; tile $0F=open ground (all zeros)
  $DB7A  0F 00 0F  SLO $0F00
  $DB7D  00        BRK 
  $DB7E  00        BRK 
  $DB7F  0F 0F 0F  SLO $0F0F
  $DB82  00        BRK 
  $DB83  0F 00 0F  SLO $0F00
  $DB86  0F 00 00  SLO $0000
  $DB89  0F 0F 0F  SLO $0F0F
  $DB8C  0F 20 10  SLO $1020
  $DB8F  20 10 20  JSR $2010
  $DB92  20 10 10  JSR $1010
  $DB95  10 20     BPL $DBB7
  $DB97  10 20     BPL CheckPlayersMoving
  $DB99  10 10     BPL $DBAB
  $DB9B  20 20 10  JSR $1020
  $DB9E  10 10     BPL $DBB0
  $DBA0  10 12     BPL $DBB4
  $DBA2  12        ??? 
  $DBA3  12        ??? 
  $DBA4  12        ??? 
  $DBA5  22        ??? 
  $DBA6  22        ??? 
  $DBA7  22        ??? 
  $DBA8  22        ??? 
  $DBA9  21 21     AND ($21,X)
  $DBAB  21 21     AND ($21,X)
  $DBAD  00        BRK 
  $DBAE  00        BRK

CheckPlayersMoving:
  $DBB9  AD 11 03  LDA $0311
  $DBBC  F0 14     BEQ $DBD2
  $DBBE  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $DBC0  20 E6 DB  JSR PlayerMovingCheck
  $DBC3  D0 20     BNE $DBE5
  $DBC5  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $DBC7  20 E6 DB  JSR PlayerMovingCheck
  $DBCA  D0 19     BNE $DBE5
  $DBCC  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DBCE  8D 11 03  STA $0311
  $DBD1  60        RTS 
  $DBD2  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $DBD4  20 E6 DB  JSR PlayerMovingCheck
  $DBD7  D0 07     BNE $DBE0
  $DBD9  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $DBDB  20 E6 DB  JSR PlayerMovingCheck
  $DBDE  F0 05     BEQ $DBE5
  $DBE0  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DBE2  8D 11 03  STA $0311
  $DBE5  60        RTS 

PlayerMovingCheck:
  $DBE6  B5 06     LDA $06,X
  $DBE8  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $DBEA  F0 07     BEQ $DBF3
  $DBEC  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DBEE  F0 03     BEQ $DBF3
  $DBF0  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DBF2  60        RTS 
  $DBF3  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DBF5  60        RTS 

EnemySpawnDispatch:
  $DBF6  A5 82     LDA $82
  $DBF8  F0 03     BEQ $DBFD
  $DBFA  C6 82     DEC $82
  $DBFC  60        RTS 
  $DBFD  A5 7F     LDA $7F
  $DBFF  F0 21     BEQ $DC22
  $DC01  A5 6C     LDA $6C
  $DC03  85 5A     STA $5A
  $DC05  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $DC07  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DC09  D0 0F     BNE $DC1A
  $DC0B  A5 84     LDA $84
  $DC0D  85 82     STA $82
  $DC0F  20 17 E4  JSR PlayerRespawn
  $DC12  C6 7F     DEC $7F
  $DC14  A5 7F     LDA $7F

  $DC19  60        RTS

  $DC1C  A5 5A     LDA $5A
  $DC1E  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $DC20  D0 E3     BNE $DC05
  $DC22  60        RTS 

PlayerInputUpdate:
  $DC23  A5 0B     LDA $0B ; PlayerInputUpdate (was mislabeled EnemyAI): processes P1(X=0) and P2(X=1) tanks each frame; frame-throttled (odd OR frame%4==0); LDX #$01 loop↓X=0; checks $6F
  $DC25  29 01     AND #$01
  $DC27  D0 06     BNE $DC2F
  $DC29  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $DC2B  29 03     AND #$03
  $DC2D  D0 6F     BNE NullHandler
  $DC2F  A2 01     LDX #$01 ; PlayerInputUpdate loop start: LDX #$01; BPL loop checks active state ($80-$DF); if $6F
  $DC31  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DC33  10 66     BPL $DC9B
  $DC35  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $DC37  B0 62     BCS $DC9B
  $DC39  B5 6F     LDA $6F,X
  $DC3B  F0 05     BEQ $DC42
  $DC3D  D6 6F     DEC $6F,X
  $DC3F  4C 54 DC  JMP $DC54
  $DC42  BD 03 01  LDA $0103,X ; AI-mode fire timer: if $0103
  $DC45  10 04     BPL $DC4B
  $DC47  29 10     AND #$10
  $DC49  D0 09     BNE $DC54
  $DC4B  B5 06     LDA $06,X ; read player directional input: LDA $06
  $DC4D  20 0E E5  JSR DecodeDirection
  $DC50  85 00     STA $00
  $DC52  10 0E     BPL $DC62
  $DC54  A9 80     LDA #$80 ; no-direction path: SetStateLo($80)+ORA $08 into $A0
  $DC56  20 DD E4  JSR SetStateLo
  $DC59  A9 08     LDA #$08
  $DC5B  15 A0     ORA $A0,X
  $DC5D  95 A0     STA $A0,X
  $DC5F  4C 9B DC  JMP $DC9B
  $DC62  BD 03 01  LDA $0103,X
  $DC65  10 0E     BPL $DC75
  $DC67  29 1F     AND #$1F
  $DC69  D0 0A     BNE $DC75
  $DC6B  A9 9C     LDA #$9C
  $DC6D  9D 03 01  STA $0103,X
  $DC70  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DC72  8D 10 03  STA $0310
  $DC75  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X ; direction-vs-state check: if new dir==current dir(bits0-1) skip snap; if new dir==opposite dir skip snap; else snap X/Y

PlayerDirChangeCheck:
  $DC77  29 03     AND #$03
  $DC79  C5 00     CMP $00
  $DC7B  F0 18     BEQ $DC95
  $DC7D  49 02     EOR #$02
  $DC7F  C5 00     CMP $00
  $DC81  F0 12     BEQ $DC95

PlayerGridSnap:
  $DC83  B5 90     LDA $90,X ; grid-snap on turn: $90
  $DC85  18        CLC 
  $DC86  69 04     ADC #$04
  $DC88  29 F8     AND #$F8
  $DC8A  95 90     STA $90,X
  $DC8C  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $DC8E  18        CLC 
  $DC8F  69 04     ADC #$04
  $DC91  29 F8     AND #$F8
  $DC93  95 98     STA $98,X
  $DC95  A5 00     LDA $00 ; commit player direction: A=decoded_dir|$A0; STA $A0
  $DC97  09 A0     ORA #$A0
  $DC99  95 A0     STA $A0,X
  $DC9B  CA        DEX 
  $DC9C  10 93     BPL $DC31

NullHandler:
  $DC9E  60        RTS 

EntityMovement:
  $DC9F  A9 07     LDA #$07
  $DCA1  85 5A     STA $5A
  $DCA3  AD 00 01  LDA $0100
  $DCA6  F0 09     BEQ $DCB1
  $DCA8  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $DCAA  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $DCAC  D0 03     BNE $DCB1
  $DCAE  CE 00 01  DEC $0100
  $DCB1  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $DCB3  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $DCB5  B0 0F     BCS $DCC6
  $DCB7  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $DCB9  29 01     AND #$01
  $DCBB  D0 2C     BNE $DCE9
  $DCBD  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $DCBF  29 03     AND #$03
  $DCC1  D0 29     BNE $DCEC
  $DCC3  4C E9 DC  JMP $DCE9
  $DCC6  AD 00 01  LDA $0100
  $DCC9  F0 08     BEQ $DCD3

  $DCDD  C9 41     CMP #$41
  $DCDF  B0 08     BCS $DCE9
  $DCE1  A5 5A     LDA $5A

  $DCF4  4A        LSR 
  $DCF5  4A        LSR 
  $DCF6  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $DCF8  A8        TAY

  $DCFC  85 11     STA $11
  $DCFE  B9 56 E5  LDA $E556,Y
  $DD01  85 12     STA $12
  $DD03  6C 11 00  JMP ($0011)

ShieldHandler:
  $DD06  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $DD08  B0 15     BCS $DD1F
  $DD0A  BD 03 01  LDA $0103,X
  $DD0D  10 10     BPL $DD1F

  $DD11  F0 0C     BEQ $DD1F
  $DD13  DE 03 01  DEC $0103,X
  $DD16  B5 B0     LDA $B0,X
  $DD18  49 04     EOR #$04
  $DD1A  95 B0     STA $B0,X
  $DD1C  4C 4B DD  JMP $DD4B
  $DD1F  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X

  $DD24  95 A0     STA $A0,X

MoveGridSnap:

  $DD32  90 17     BCC $DD4B
  $DD34  B5 90     LDA $90,X
  $DD36  29 07     AND #$07
  $DD38  D0 11     BNE $DD4B
  $DD3A  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $DD3C  29 07     AND #$07
  $DD3E  D0 0B     BNE $DD4B

  $DD43  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $DD45  D0 04     BNE $DD4B
  $DD47  20 26 DF  JSR SpeedCtrlMove
  $DD4A  60        RTS 
  $DD4B  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X ; MoveGridSnap_ProbeSetup: $58=|dx|*8 $59=|dy|*8 $56=entity_X+dx $57=entity_Y+dy; probe1=(X+$58+$59
  $DD4D  29 03     AND #$03
  $DD4F  A8        TAY 
  $DD50  B9 2D E5  LDA DirDeltaX,Y
  $DD53  0A        ASL 
  $DD54  0A        ASL 
  $DD55  0A        ASL 
  $DD56  85 59     STA $59
  $DD58  B9 2D E5  LDA DirDeltaX,Y
  $DD5B  18        CLC 
  $DD5C  75 98     ADC $98,X
  $DD5E  85 57     STA $57
  $DD60  B9 29 E5  LDA DirDeltaY,Y
  $DD63  0A        ASL 
  $DD64  0A        ASL 
  $DD65  0A        ASL 
  $DD66  85 58     STA $58
  $DD68  B9 29 E5  LDA DirDeltaY,Y
  $DD6B  18        CLC 
  $DD6C  75 90     ADC $90,X
  $DD6E  85 56     STA $56
  $DD70  18        CLC 
  $DD71  65 58     ADC $58
  $DD73  18        CLC 
  $DD74  65 59     ADC $59
  $DD76  20 22 DE  JSR ClampXMove
  $DD79  AA        TAX 
  $DD7A  A5 57     LDA $57

  $DD80  65 59     ADC $59

  $DDA5  E5 58     SBC $58

RandomDirChange:
  $DDFC  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $DDFF  29 01     AND #$01
  $DE01  F0 1B     BEQ $DE1E
  $DE03  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $DE06  29 01     AND #$01
  $DE08  F0 08     BEQ $DE12
  $DE0A  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X

  $DE0D  69 01     ADC #$01
  $DE0F  4C 17 DE  JMP $DE17

  $DE22  C5 56     CMP $56

  $DE2E  38        SEC 
  $DE2F  E9 01     SBC #$01
  $DE31  60        RTS 

DirTowardP1:
  $DE32  A5 90     LDA $90
  $DE34  85 71     STA $71
  $DE36  A5 98     LDA $98
  $DE38  85 72     STA $72
  $DE3A  4C 50 DE  JMP DirTowardTarget

DirTowardP2:

  $DE3F  85 71     STA $71
  $DE41  A5 99     LDA $99
  $DE43  85 72     STA $72
  $DE45  4C 50 DE  JMP DirTowardTarget

DirTowardHQ:
  $DE48  A9 78     LDA #$78
  $DE4A  85 71     STA $71
  $DE4C  A9 D8     LDA #$D8
  $DE4E  85 72     STA $72

DirTowardTarget:
  $DE50  20 56 DE  JSR CalcDirToTarget
  $DE53  95 A0     STA $A0,X
  $DE55  60        RTS 

CalcDirToTarget:
  $DE56  A5 71     LDA $71 ; CalcDirToTarget: sign(TargetX-EntityX)+1->$64; sign(TargetY-EntityY)+1->$65; idx=$65*3+$64 (0..8)
  $DE58  38        SEC 
  $DE59  F5 90     SBC $90,X
  $DE5B  20 5D DB  JSR SignFn
  $DE5E  18        CLC 
  $DE5F  69 01     ADC #$01
  $DE61  85 64     STA $64
  $DE63  A5 72     LDA $72
  $DE65  38        SEC 
  $DE66  F5 98     SBC $98,X
  $DE68  20 5D DB  JSR SignFn
  $DE6B  18        CLC 
  $DE6C  69 01     ADC #$01
  $DE6E  85 65     STA $65
  $DE70  0A        ASL  ; idx formula: A=$65*3+$64; enemy uses RNG to pick +9(X-prefer); player uses fire-btn bit
  $DE71  18        CLC 
  $DE72  65 65     ADC $65
  $DE74  18        CLC 
  $DE75  65 64     ADC $64
  $DE77  85 64     STA $64
  $DE79  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $DE7B  B0 0B     BCS $DE88
  $DE7D  8A        TXA 
  $DE7E  0A        ASL 
  $DE7F  45 0A     EOR $0A
  $DE81  29 02     AND #$02
  $DE83  F0 13     BEQ $DE98
  $DE85  4C 8F DE  JMP $DE8F
  $DE88  20 7C D3  JSR RNG ; Enemy: 50% chance use X-preferred table (idx+9); else Y-preferred
  $DE8B  29 01     AND #$01
  $DE8D  F0 09     BEQ $DE98
  $DE8F  A9 09     LDA #$09
  $DE91  18        CLC 
  $DE92  65 64     ADC $64
  $DE94  A8        TAY 
  $DE95  4C 9A DE  JMP $DE9A
  $DE98  A4 64     LDY $64
  $DE9A  B9 43 E5  LDA DirToStateTable,Y
  $DE9D  60        RTS 

StateCountdown:
  $DE9E  D6 A0     DEC $A0,X
  $DEA0  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DEA2  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $DEA4  D0 53     BNE $DEF9
  $DEA6  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DEA8  38        SEC 
  $DEA9  E9 10     SBC #$10
  $DEAB  F0 0E     BEQ $DEBB
  $DEAD  C9 10     CMP #$10
  $DEAF  D0 05     BNE $DEB6
  $DEB1  09 06     ORA #$06
  $DEB3  4C B8 DE  JMP $DEB8
  $DEB6  09 03     ORA #$03
  $DEB8  95 A0     STA $A0,X

PlayerKilled:
  $DEBA  60        RTS 
  $DEBB  95 A0     STA $A0,X
  $DEBD  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $DEBF  B0 08     BCS EnemyKilled
  $DEC1  D6 51     DEC $51,X
  $DEC3  F0 07     BEQ PlayerDeathScrollCheck
  $DEC5  20 17 E4  JSR PlayerRespawn
  $DEC8  60        RTS

  $DEC9  C6 80     DEC $80
  $DECB  60        RTS 

PlayerDeathScrollCheck:
  $DECC  A5 68     LDA $68
  $DECE  C9 80     CMP #$80
  $DED0  D0 27     BNE $DEF9
  $DED2  E0 01     CPX #$01
  $DED4  F0 12     BEQ P2DeathScrollLeft
  $DED6  A5 52     LDA $52
  $DED8  F0 1F     BEQ $DEF9
  $DEDA  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $DEDC  8D 07 01  STA $0107
  $DEDF  A9 20     LDA #$20
  $DEE1  8D 05 01  STA $0105
  $DEE4  20 FA DE  JSR SetDeathScrollParams
  $DEE7  60        RTS 

P2DeathScrollLeft:
  $DEE8  A5 51     LDA $51
  $DEEA  F0 0D     BEQ $DEF9
  $DEEC  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $DEEE  8D 07 01  STA $0107
  $DEF1  A9 C0     LDA #$C0
  $DEF3  8D 05 01  STA $0105
  $DEF6  20 FA DE  JSR SetDeathScrollParams
  $DEF9  60        RTS 

SetDeathScrollParams:
  $DEFA  A9 0D     LDA #$0D
  $DEFC  8D 08 01  STA $0108
  $DEFF  A9 D8     LDA #$D8
  $DF01  8D 06 01  STA $0106
  $DF04  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DF06  85 0B     STA $0B
  $DF08  60        RTS 

StateIncSlot:
  $DF09  F6 A0     INC $A0,X
  $DF0B  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DF0D  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $DF0F  C9 0E     CMP #$0E

  $DF17  60        RTS 

StateIncFire:

  $DF1A  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DF1C  29 0F     AND #$0F

SpeedCtrlMove:
  $DF26  A5 84     LDA $84
  $DF28  4A        LSR 
  $DF29  4A        LSR 
  $DF2A  C5 0A     CMP $0A
  $DF2C  B0 05     BCS $DF33
  $DF2E  A9 B0     LDA #$B0
  $DF30  4C 56 DF  JMP $DF56
  $DF33  4A        LSR 
  $DF34  C5 0A     CMP $0A
  $DF36  90 0A     BCC $DF42
  $DF38  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $DF3B  29 03     AND #$03
  $DF3D  09 A0     ORA #$A0
  $DF3F  95 A0     STA $A0,X
  $DF41  60        RTS 
  $DF42  A5 A0     LDA $A0
  $DF44  F0 09     BEQ $DF4F
  $DF46  8A        TXA 
  $DF47  29 01     AND #$01
  $DF49  F0 09     BEQ $DF54
  $DF4B  A5 A1     LDA $A1
  $DF4D  F0 05     BEQ $DF54
  $DF4F  A9 C0     LDA #$C0
  $DF51  4C 56 DF  JMP $DF56
  $DF54  A9 D0     LDA #$D0
  $DF56  20 DD E4  JSR SetStateLo
  $DF59  60        RTS 

MoveUpdate:
  $DF5A  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DF5C  85 5A     STA $5A
  $DF5E  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $DF60  20 6C DF  JSR $DF6C
  $DF63  E6 5A     INC $5A
  $DF65  A5 5A     LDA $5A
  $DF67  C9 08     CMP #$08
  $DF69  D0 F3     BNE $DF5E
  $DF6B  60        RTS 
  $DF6C  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DF6E  4A        LSR 
  $DF6F  4A        LSR 
  $DF70  4A        LSR 
  $DF71  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $DF73  A8        TAY

  $DF77  85 11     STA $11
  $DF79  B9 76 E5  LDA $E576,Y
  $DF7C  85 12     STA $12
  $DF7E  6C 11 00  JMP ($0011)

DrawMovingSprite:
  $DF81  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $DF83  85 6E     STA $6E
  $DF85  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $DF87  48        PHA 
  $DF88  B4 98     LDY $98,X
  $DF8A  B5 90     LDA $90,X
  $DF8C  AA        TAX 
  $DF8D  68        PLA 
  $DF8E  20 96 DF  JSR CalcSprTile
  $DF91  A9 20     LDA #$20
  $DF93  85 6E     STA $6E
  $DF95  60        RTS 

CalcSprTile:
  $DF96  4A        LSR 
  $DF97  4A        LSR 
  $DF98  4A        LSR 
  $DF99  4A        LSR 
  $DF9A  38        SEC 
  $DF9B  E9 07     SBC #$07
  $DF9D  49 FF     EOR #$FF
  $DF9F  18        CLC 
  $DFA0  69 01     ADC #$01
  $DFA2  0A        ASL 
  $DFA3  0A        ASL 
  $DFA4  18        CLC 
  $DFA5  69 F1     ADC #$F1
  $DFA7  85 53     STA $53
  $DFA9  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $DFAB  85 04     STA $04
  $DFAD  20 0A DB  JSR DrawTank
  $DFB0  60        RTS 

DrawSpawnSprite:

  $DFB3  85 6E     STA $6E
  $DFB5  B5 A8     LDA $A8,X
  $DFB7  F0 1E     BEQ $DFD7
  $DFB9  B5 A8     LDA $A8,X
  $DFBB  4A        LSR 
  $DFBC  4A        LSR 
  $DFBD  4A        LSR 
  $DFBE  29 FC     AND #$FC
  $DFC0  38        SEC 
  $DFC1  E9 10     SBC #$10
  $DFC3  18        CLC 
  $DFC4  69 B9     ADC #$B9
  $DFC6  85 53     STA $53 ; DrawSpawnSprite tile: $53=(($A8
  $DFC8  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $DFCA  85 04     STA $04
  $DFCC  B4 98     LDY $98,X
  $DFCE  B5 90     LDA $90,X
  $DFD0  AA        TAX 
  $DFD1  20 0A DB  JSR DrawTank
  $DFD4  4C E2 DF  JMP $DFE2
  $DFD7  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $DFD9  A8        TAY 
  $DFDA  B5 90     LDA $90,X

  $DFE4  85 6E     STA $6E

MoveTank:
  $E06A  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $E06C  90 23     BCC $E091
  $E06E  B5 A8     LDA $A8,X
  $E070  29 04     AND #$04
  $E072  F0 0D     BEQ $E081
  $E074  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $E076  4A        LSR 
  $E077  4A        LSR 
  $E078  4A        LSR 
  $E079  29 01     AND #$01
  $E07B  18        CLC 
  $E07C  69 02     ADC #$02
  $E07E  4C 9D E0  JMP $E09D
  $E081  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $E083  0A        ASL 
  $E084  0A        ASL 
  $E085  18        CLC 
  $E086  75 A8     ADC $A8,X
  $E088  29 07     AND #$07
  $E08A  A8        TAY 
  $E08B  B9 B7 E0  LDA EnemySpeedTable,Y
  $E08E  4C 9D E0  JMP $E09D
  $E091  B5 6F     LDA $6F,X
  $E093  F0 07     BEQ $E09C
  $E095  A5 0B     LDA $0B
  $E097  29 08     AND #$08
  $E099  F0 01     BEQ $E09C
  $E09B  60        RTS 
  $E09C  8A        TXA 
  $E09D  85 04     STA $04

MoveTankSpriteCalc:

  $E0BC  01 02     ORA ($02,X)
  $E0BE  02        ??? 

DrawShootSprite:
  $E0BF  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X ; DrawShootSprite: in-flight bullet visible sprite; A=|($A0
  $E0C1  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $E0C3  38        SEC 
  $E0C4  E9 07     SBC #$07
  $E0C6  10 05     BPL $E0CD
  $E0C8  49 FF     EOR #$FF

  $E0D0  18        CLC

  $E0E1  60        RTS 

BulletUpdate:
  $E0E2  A9 09     LDA #$09
  $E0E4  85 5A     STA $5A
  $E0E6  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $E0E8  20 F0 E0  JSR BulletDispatch
  $E0EB  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $E0ED  10 F7     BPL $E0E6
  $E0EF  60        RTS 

BulletDispatch:
  $E0F0  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E0F2  4A        LSR 
  $E0F3  4A        LSR 
  $E0F4  4A        LSR 
  $E0F5  29 FE     AND #$FE
  $E0F7  A8        TAY 
  $E0F8  B9 95 E5  LDA BulletDispatchTable,Y
  $E0FB  85 11     STA $11
  $E0FD  B9 96 E5  LDA $E596,Y
  $E100  85 12     STA $12
  $E102  6C 11 00  JMP ($0011)

BulletImpact:
  $E105  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E107  29 03     AND #$03
  $E109  A8        TAY 
  $E10A  20 17 E1  JSR BulletDelta
  $E10D  B5 D6     LDA $D6,X
  $E10F  29 01     AND #$01
  $E111  F0 03     BEQ $E116
  $E113  20 17 E1  JSR BulletDelta
  $E116  60        RTS 

BulletDelta:
  $E117  B9 29 E5  LDA DirDeltaY,Y
  $E11A  0A        ASL 
  $E11B  18        CLC 
  $E11C  75 B8     ADC $B8,X
  $E11E  95 B8     STA $B8,X
  $E120  B9 2D E5  LDA DirDeltaX,Y
  $E123  0A        ASL 
  $E124  18        CLC 
  $E125  75 C2     ADC $C2,X
  $E127  95 C2     STA $C2,X
  $E129  60        RTS 

BulletCountdown:
  $E12A  D6 CC     DEC $CC,X
  $E12C  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E12E  29 0F     AND #$0F
  $E130  D0 0D     BNE $E13F
  $E132  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E134  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $E136  38        SEC 
  $E137  E9 10     SBC #$10
  $E139  F0 02     BEQ $E13D
  $E13B  09 03     ORA #$03
  $E13D  95 CC     STA $CC,X
  $E13F  60        RTS 

FireBullet:
  $E140  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E142  D0 47     BNE $E18B
  $E144  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $E146  B0 05     BCS $E14D
  $E148  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $E14A  8D 0F 03  STA $030F
  $E14D  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $E14F  29 03     AND #$03
  $E151  A8        TAY 
  $E152  09 40     ORA #$40
  $E154  95 CC     STA $CC,X
  $E156  B9 29 E5  LDA DirDeltaY,Y
  $E159  0A        ASL 
  $E15A  0A        ASL 
  $E15B  0A        ASL 
  $E15C  18        CLC 
  $E15D  75 90     ADC $90,X
  $E15F  95 B8     STA $B8,X
  $E161  B9 2D E5  LDA DirDeltaX,Y
  $E164  0A        ASL 
  $E165  0A        ASL 
  $E166  0A        ASL 
  $E167  18        CLC 
  $E168  75 98     ADC $98,X
  $E16A  95 C2     STA $C2,X
  $E16C  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $E16E  95 D6     STA $D6,X
  $E170  B5 A8     LDA $A8,X
  $E172  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $E174  F0 15     BEQ $E18B
  $E176  C9 C0     CMP #$C0
  $E178  F0 08     BEQ $E182
  $E17A  C9 60     CMP #$60
  $E17C  F0 09     BEQ $E187
  $E17E  29 80     AND #$80
  $E180  D0 09     BNE $E18B
  $E182  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $E184  95 D6     STA $D6,X
  $E186  60        RTS 
  $E187  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $E189  95 D6     STA $D6,X
  $E18B  60        RTS 

CollisionUpdate:
  $E18C  A9 09     LDA #$09
  $E18E  85 5A     STA $5A

BulletExplode:
  $E1AF  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E1B1  29 03     AND #$03
  $E1B3  48        PHA 
  $E1B4  B4 C2     LDY $C2,X
  $E1B6  B5 B8     LDA $B8,X
  $E1B8  AA        TAX 
  $E1B9  A9 02     LDA #$02
  $E1BB  85 04     STA $04
  $E1BD  A9 B1     LDA #$B1
  $E1BF  85 53     STA $53 ; BulletExplode tile setup: $53=$B1 → ODD→PT1(BG bank); dir*2 added by $DAF3; tiles $B0-$B7
  $E1C1  68        PLA 
  $E1C2  20 F3 DA  JSR BulletExplosionDraw
  $E1C5  60        RTS 

BulletTravel:

  $E1D5  60        RTS 

PlayerFireCheck:
  $E1D6  A9 01     LDA #$01 ; PlayerFireCheck: loops X=1→0 (player slots); reads $08
  $E1D8  85 5A     STA $5A
  $E1DA  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $E1DC  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $E1DE  10 31     BPL $E211
  $E1E0  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $E1E2  B0 2D     BCS $E211
  $E1E4  B5 08     LDA $08,X
  $E1E6  29 03     AND #$03
  $E1E8  F0 27     BEQ $E211
  $E1EA  B5 A8     LDA $A8,X
  $E1EC  29 C0     AND #$C0
  $E1EE  C9 40     CMP #$40
  $E1F0  D0 1C     BNE $E20E
  $E1F2  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E1F4  F0 18     BEQ $E20E
  $E1F6  B5 D4     LDA $D4,X
  $E1F8  D0 17     BNE $E211
  $E1FA  B5 CC     LDA $CC,X
  $E1FC  95 D4     STA $D4,X
  $E1FE  B5 B8     LDA $B8,X
  $E200  95 C0     STA $C0,X
  $E202  B5 C2     LDA $C2,X
  $E204  95 CA     STA $CA,X
  $E206  B5 D6     LDA $D6,X
  $E208  95 DE     STA $DE,X
  $E20A  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $E20C  95 CC     STA $CC,X
  $E20E  20 40 E1  JSR FireBullet
  $E211  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $E213  10 C5     BPL $E1DA
  $E215  60        RTS 

EnemyFireCheck:
  $E216  AD 00 01  LDA $0100 ; EnemyFireCheck: if $0100!=0 skip; loops X=7→2 (enemy slots only; exits at X=1); active entity: JSR RNG AND$1F==0 → FireBullet (random 1-in-32 fire per update)
  $E219  D0 19     BNE $E234
  $E21B  A2 07     LDX #$07
  $E21D  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $E21F  10 0E     BPL $E22F
  $E221  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $E223  B0 0A     BCS $E22F
  $E225  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $E228  29 1F     AND #$1F
  $E22A  D0 03     BNE $E22F
  $E22C  20 40 E1  JSR FireBullet
  $E22F  CA        DEX 
  $E230  E0 01     CPX #$01
  $E232  D0 E9     BNE $E21D
  $E234  60        RTS 

CalcTilePos:
  $E235  A9 07     LDA #$07
  $E237  85 5A     STA $5A
  $E239  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $E23B  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $E23D  10 63     BPL $E2A2
  $E23F  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $E241  B0 5F     BCS $E2A2
  $E243  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $E245  38        SEC 
  $E246  E9 08     SBC #$08
  $E248  A8        TAY 
  $E249  B5 90     LDA $90,X
  $E24B  38        SEC 
  $E24C  E9 08     SBC #$08
  $E24E  AA        TAX 
  $E24F  20 26 D7  JSR PPUAddrFromXY
  $E252  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $E254  A5 11     LDA $11
  $E256  95 E0     STA $E0,X
  $E258  A5 12     LDA $12
  $E25A  29 03     AND #$03
  $E25C  95 E8     STA $E8,X
  $E25E  A0 21     LDY #$21
  $E260  E0 02     CPX #$02
  $E262  B0 19     BCS $E27D
  $E264  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y
  $E266  C9 21     CMP #$21
  $E268  D0 0B     BNE $E275
  $E26A  A9 80     LDA #$80
  $E26C  1D 03 01  ORA $0103,X
  $E26F  9D 03 01  STA $0103,X
  $E272  4C 7D E2  JMP $E27D
  $E275  BD 03 01  LDA $0103,X
  $E278  29 7F     AND #$7F
  $E27A  9D 03 01  STA $0103,X
  $E27D  20 A7 E2  JSR $E2A7
  $E280  B5 90     LDA $90,X
  $E282  29 07     AND #$07
  $E284  D0 0B     BNE $E291
  $E286  B5 E8     LDA $E8,X
  $E288  09 80     ORA #$80
  $E28A  95 E8     STA $E8,X
  $E28C  A0 20     LDY #$20
  $E28E  20 A7 E2  JSR $E2A7
  $E291  B5 98     LDA $98,X
  $E293  29 07     AND #$07
  $E295  D0 0B     BNE $E2A2
  $E297  B5 E8     LDA $E8,X
  $E299  09 40     ORA #$40
  $E29B  95 E8     STA $E8,X
  $E29D  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $E29F  20 A7 E2  JSR $E2A7
  $E2A2  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $E2A4  10 93     BPL $E239
  $E2A6  60        RTS 
  $E2A7  B1 11     LDA ($11),Y
  $E2A9  09 80     ORA #$80
  $E2AB  91 11     STA ($11),Y
  $E2AD  60        RTS 

ClearTileFlags:
  $E2AE  A9 07     LDA #$07 ; ClearTileFlags: loops X=7→0; for each active entity: compute nametable tile ptr ($E0
  $E2B0  85 5A     STA $5A
  $E2B2  A6 5A     LDX $5A
  $E2B4  B5 A0     LDA $A0,X
  $E2B6  10 2B     BPL $E2E3
  $E2B8  C9 E0     CMP #$E0
  $E2BA  B0 27     BCS $E2E3
  $E2BC  B5 E0     LDA $E0,X
  $E2BE  85 11     STA $11
  $E2C0  B5 E8     LDA $E8,X
  $E2C2  29 03     AND #$03
  $E2C4  09 04     ORA #$04
  $E2C6  85 12     STA $12
  $E2C8  A0 21     LDY #$21
  $E2CA  20 E8 E2  JSR $E2E8
  $E2CD  B5 E8     LDA $E8,X

  $E2D1  F0 05     BEQ $E2D8

EntityUpdate:
  $E2EF  A5 86     LDA $86

  $E302  A9 02     LDA #$02 ; PowerUpFlashDraw: $53=$3B → ODD→PT1(BG bank); tiles $3A-$3D at collect position
  $E304  85 04     STA $04
  $E306  A9 3B     LDA #$3B
  $E308  85 53     STA $53
  $E30A  4C 20 E3  JMP $E320

PowerUpActiveDraw:

  $E30F  29 08     AND #$08
  $E311  F0 1C     BEQ $E32F
  $E313  A9 02     LDA #$02

EagleStateUpdate:
  $E386  A5 68     LDA $68 ; EagleStateUpdate: exit if $68=0 or neg; DEC $68; x=$68>>2; Y=2×||(x-5)|-5|; JMP via EagleHandlerTable (39-frame animation)
  $E388  F0 2F     BEQ $E3B9
  $E38A  30 2D     BMI $E3B9
  $E38C  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $E38E  85 04     STA $04
  $E390  C6 68     DEC $68
  $E392  A5 68     LDA $68

  $E399  10 05     BPL $E3A0

EagleDrawSingle:
  $E3DC  18        CLC 
  $E3DD  65 69     ADC $69
  $E3DF  4C D6 E3  JMP $E3D6

EagleDrawFull:
  $E3F2  A2 70     LDX #$70 ; EagleDrawFull: tiles $D1/$D5/$D9/$DD (+$69 for damaged); ALL ODD→PT1(BG bank); tiles $D0-$EF from BG bank

  $E3F6  A9 D1     LDA #$D1

; Range $E529–$E531 (s8) DirDeltaTable

DirDeltaY:
  $E529  00        .byte $00  ; +0
  $E52A  FF        .byte $FF  ; -1
  $E52B  00        .byte $00  ; +0
  $E52C  01        .byte $01  ; +1

DirDeltaX:
  $E52D  FF        .byte $FF  ; -1
  $E52E  00        .byte $00  ; +0
  $E52F  01        .byte $01  ; +1
  $E530  00        .byte $00  ; +0

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $E53B–$E543 (u8) InitState

InitState:
  $E53B  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $E543–$E555 (u8) DirToStateTable
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

DirToStateTable:
  $E543  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160 ; DirToStateTable [18 bytes]: idx=dy_sign01*3+dx_sign01; [0..8]=prefer-Y states; [9..17]=prefer-X states (applied +9 for enemy RNG or player fire)
  $E544  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160
  $E545  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160
  $E546  A1        .byte $A1  ; 161
  $E547  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160

MovementDispatch:
  $E555  9E DC     .word $DC9E -> NullHandler
  $E557  9E DE     .word $DE9E -> StateCountdown
  $E559  9E DE     .word $DE9E -> StateCountdown
  $E55B  9E DE     .word $DE9E -> StateCountdown

  $E56D  3D DE     .word $DE3D -> DirTowardP2
  $E56F  32 DE     .word $DE32 -> DirTowardP1
  $E571  18 DF     .word $DF18 -> StateIncFire
  $E573  09 DF     .word $DF09 -> StateIncSlot
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $E575–$E595 (ptr16) MoveUpdateDispatch

BulletDispatchTable:

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $E5A9–$E5D1 (u8) EnemyTypeTable
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

EnemyTypeTable:
  $E5A9  80        .byte $80  ; 128 ; EnemyTypeTable[40]: Y=(GameSpeed-1)*4+slot; maps 4 enemy type slots to EntityType bytes; $80=Basic/$A0=Fast/$C0=Power/$E0=Armor; order shuffled per difficulty
  $E5AA  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160
  $E5AB  C0        .byte $C0  ; 192
  $E5AC  E0        .byte $E0  ; 224
  $E5AD  80        .byte $80  ; 128
  $E5AE  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160
  $E5AF  C0        .byte $C0  ; 192
  $E5B0  E0        .byte $E0  ; 224
  $E5B1  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160

  $E5B3  E0        .byte $E0  ; 224
  $E5B4  80        .byte $80  ; 128
  $E5B5  C0        .byte $C0  ; 192
  $E5B6  A0        .byte $A0  ; 160
  $E5B7  80        .byte $80  ; 128
  $E5B8  E0        .byte $E0  ; 224
  $E5B9  C0        .byte $C0  ; 192
  $E5BA  E0        .byte $E0  ; 224
  $E5BB  80        .byte $80  ; 128

PowerUpSpawnPickPos:

  $EA65  8D 09 03  STA $0309
  $EA68  20 7C D3  JSR RNG
  $EA6B  29 03     AND #$03

  $EAA5  04 03     NOP $03

  $EBD0  A9 73     LDA #$73
  $EBD2  99 A0 00  STA $00A0,Y
  $EBD5  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EBD7  99 A8 00  STA $00A8,Y
  $EBDA  C6 5A     DEC $5A
  $EBDC  A5 5A     LDA $5A
  $EBDE  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $EBE0  D0 E3     BNE $EBC5
  $EBE2  60        RTS 
  $EBE3  F6 51     INC $51,X
  $EBE5  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $EBE7  8D 04 03  STA $0304
  $EBEA  8D 05 03  STA $0305
  $EBED  60        RTS 

BulletDeltaX:
  $EBEE  00        BRK 
  $EBEF  FF 00 01  ISC $0100,X

BulletDeltaY:
  $EBF2  FF 00 01  ISC $0100,X
  $EBF5  00        BRK 

SoundResetInit:
  $EBF6  A9 0F     LDA #$0F ; SoundResetInit: STA $4015=$0F (enable sq1/sq2/tri/noise) + STA $4017=$C0 (5-step frame IRQ-inhibit); zero 28 slots in $031C-$03F3 (stride 8 via $F0/$F1) and counters $0300-$031B
  $EBF8  8D 15 40  STA $4015
  $EBFB  A9 C0     LDA #$C0
  $EBFD  8D 17 40  STA $4017
  $EC00  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $EC02  85 F0     STA $F0
  $EC04  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $EC06  85 F1     STA $F1
  $EC08  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $EC0A  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $EC0C  98        TYA 
  $EC0D  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EC0F  9D 00 03  STA $0300,X
  $EC12  18        CLC 
  $EC13  A5 F0     LDA $F0
  $EC15  69 08     ADC #$08
  $EC17  85 F0     STA $F0
  $EC19  90 02     BCC $EC1D
  $EC1B  E6 F1     INC $F1
  $EC1D  E8        INX 
  $EC1E  E0 1C     CPX #$1C
  $EC20  D0 EA     BNE $EC0C
  $EC22  60        RTS 

SoundEngine:
  $EC23  A5 6D     LDA $6D ; SoundEngine: per-frame APU driver; 28 sound slots at $031C+; ZP $F0/$F1=slot-ptr $F4=idx $F5=limit $F9-$FC=active; writes 4 regs via STA $4000
  $EC25  D0 06     BNE SoundEngineUpdate
  $EC27  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $EC29  85 F5     STA $F5
  $EC2B  10 04     BPL $EC31

SoundEngineUpdate:
  $EC2D  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $EC2F  85 F5     STA $F5
  $EC31  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EC33  A2 03     LDX #$03
  $EC35  95 F9     STA $F9,X
  $EC37  CA        DEX 
  $EC38  10 FB     BPL $EC35
  $EC3A  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EC3C  85 F4     STA $F4
  $EC3E  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $EC40  85 F0     STA $F0
  $EC42  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $EC44  85 F1     STA $F1
  $EC46  A6 F4     LDX $F4
  $EC48  BD 00 03  LDA $0300,X
  $EC4B  F0 3B     BEQ $EC88
  $EC4D  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $EC4F  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EC51  F0 35     BEQ $EC88
  $EC53  C9 05     CMP #$05
  $EC55  90 0B     BCC $EC62
  $EC57  38        SEC 
  $EC58  E9 05     SBC #$05
  $EC5A  AA        TAX 
  $EC5B  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $EC5D  95 F9     STA $F9,X
  $EC5F  4C 88 EC  JMP $EC88
  $EC62  AA        TAX 
  $EC63  CA        DEX 
  $EC64  B5 F9     LDA $F9,X
  $EC66  D0 20     BNE $EC88
  $EC68  A9 01     LDA #$01
  $EC6A  95 F9     STA $F9,X
  $EC6C  8A        TXA 
  $EC6D  A8        TAY 
  $EC6E  18        CLC 
  $EC6F  69 05     ADC #$05
  $EC71  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $EC73  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EC75  8A        TXA 
  $EC76  0A        ASL 
  $EC77  0A        ASL 
  $EC78  AA        TAX 
  $EC79  A9 04     LDA #$04
  $EC7B  85 FD     STA $FD
  $EC7D  C8        INY 
  $EC7E  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y

SoundAPUWrite:
  $EC80  9D 00 40  STA $4000,X ; SoundAPUWrite: STA $4000
  $EC83  E8        INX 
  $EC84  C6 FD     DEC $FD
  $EC86  D0 F5     BNE $EC7D
  $EC88  18        CLC 
  $EC89  A5 F0     LDA $F0
  $EC8B  69 08     ADC #$08
  $EC8D  85 F0     STA $F0
  $EC8F  90 02     BCC $EC93
  $EC91  E6 F1     INC $F1
  $EC93  E6 F4     INC $F4
  $EC95  A5 F4     LDA $F4
  $EC97  C5 F5     CMP $F5
  $EC99  90 AB     BCC $EC46
  $EC9B  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $EC9D  86 FD     STX $FD
  $EC9F  B5 F9     LDA $F9,X
  $ECA1  D0 0C     BNE $ECAF
  $ECA3  8A        TXA 
  $ECA4  0A        ASL 
  $ECA5  0A        ASL 
  $ECA6  AA        TAX 
  $ECA7  0A        ASL 
  $ECA8  29 10     AND #$10
  $ECAA  49 10     EOR #$10

SoundChSilence:
  $ECAC  9D 00 40  STA $4000,X ; SoundChSilence: mute channel: write ((ch_idx<<2)&$10)^$10 to $4000+ch_base (clears duty/volume bit4 = volume 0)
  $ECAF  A6 FD     LDX $FD
  $ECB1  E8        INX 
  $ECB2  E0 04     CPX #$04
  $ECB4  90 E7     BCC $EC9D
  $ECB6  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $ECB8  84 F4     STY $F4
  $ECBA  A9 1C     LDA #$1C
  $ECBC  85 F0     STA $F0
  $ECBE  A9 03     LDA #$03
  $ECC0  85 F1     STA $F1
  $ECC2  A6 F4     LDX $F4
  $ECC4  BD 00 03  LDA $0300,X
  $ECC7  F0 0A     BEQ $ECD3
  $ECC9  C9 01     CMP #$01
  $ECCB  D0 1A     BNE $ECE7
  $ECCD  FE 00 03  INC $0300,X
  $ECD0  4C F4 EC  JMP SoundSeqInit
  $ECD3  18        CLC 
  $ECD4  A5 F0     LDA $F0
  $ECD6  69 08     ADC #$08
  $ECD8  85 F0     STA $F0
  $ECDA  90 02     BCC $ECDE
  $ECDC  E6 F1     INC $F1
  $ECDE  E6 F4     INC $F4
  $ECE0  A5 F4     LDA $F4
  $ECE2  C5 F5     CMP $F5
  $ECE4  90 DC     BCC $ECC2
  $ECE6  60        RTS 
  $ECE7  A0 07     LDY #$07
  $ECE9  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $ECEB  38        SEC 
  $ECEC  E9 01     SBC #$01
  $ECEE  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ECF0  F0 38     BEQ $ED2A
  $ECF2  D0 DF     BNE $ECD3

SoundSeqInit:
  $ECF4  A9 00     LDA #$00 ; SoundSeqInit: reads 4 header bytes (ch
  $ECF6  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $ECF8  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ECFA  20 54 EE  JSR SoundSeqPtrLoad
  $ECFD  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $ED00  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $ED02  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED04  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $ED07  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $ED09  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED0B  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $ED0E  A0 02     LDY #$02
  $ED10  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED12  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $ED15  A0 04     LDY #$04
  $ED17  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED19  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $ED1B  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $ED1D  C9 04     CMP #$04
  $ED1F  D0 0C     BNE SoundSeqDecode
  $ED21  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $ED24  A0 03     LDY #$03
  $ED26  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED28  10 03     BPL SoundSeqDecode
  $ED2A  20 54 EE  JSR SoundSeqPtrLoad

SoundSeqDecode:
  $ED2D  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte ; SoundSeqDecode: main loop; $00-$5F=note(semitone=bits7-3 octave=bits2-0); $60=hold; $61-$E7=dur(byte-$60); $E8+=cmd dispatch
  $ED30  C9 E8     CMP #$E8
  $ED32  B0 52     BCS $ED86
  $ED34  C9 60     CMP #$60
  $ED36  F0 44     BEQ $ED7C
  $ED38  90 09     BCC $ED43
  $ED3A  E9 60     SBC #$60
  $ED3C  A0 06     LDY #$06
  $ED3E  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED40  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode
  $ED43  48        PHA 
  $ED44  29 F8     AND #$F8
  $ED46  4A        LSR 
  $ED47  4A        LSR 
  $ED48  AA        TAX 
  $ED49  BD 8B EE  LDA NoteFreqTable,X
  $ED4C  85 FD     STA $FD
  $ED4E  BD 8C EE  LDA $EE8C,X
  $ED51  85 FE     STA $FE
  $ED53  68        PLA 
  $ED54  29 07     AND #$07
  $ED56  F0 08     BEQ $ED60
  $ED58  AA        TAX 
  $ED59  46 FD     LSR $FD
  $ED5B  66 FE     ROR $FE
  $ED5D  CA        DEX 
  $ED5E  D0 F9     BNE $ED59
  $ED60  A0 04     LDY #$04
  $ED62  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $ED64  29 F8     AND #$F8
  $ED66  05 FD     ORA $FD
  $ED68  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED6A  A5 FE     LDA $FE
  $ED6C  88        DEY 
  $ED6D  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED6F  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $ED71  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $ED73  C9 05     CMP #$05
  $ED75  90 05     BCC $ED7C
  $ED77  38        SEC 
  $ED78  E9 04     SBC #$04
  $ED7A  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED7C  A0 06     LDY #$06
  $ED7E  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $ED80  C8        INY 
  $ED81  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $ED83  4C D3 EC  JMP $ECD3
  $ED86  E9 E8     SBC #$E8
  $ED88  20 75 EE  JSR $EE75

SoundCmdDispatchTable:
  $ED8B  AF ED C6  LAX $C6ED ; SoundCmdDispatchTable: 16×ptr16 for cmds $E8-$F7; stop/modvol/setregs/$EF-loop-reset/$F0-$F2 loops/$F3-$F7 skip
  $ED8E  ED D8 ED  SBC SoundCmdModVolHi2
  $ED91  EA        NOP 
  $ED92  ED FC ED  SBC SoundCmdSetTimerLo
  $ED95  06 EE     ASL $EE
  $ED97  10 EE     BPL $ED87
  $ED99  1A        NOP 
  $ED9A  EE 26 EE  INC SoundCmdInnerLoop
  $ED9D  2A        ROL 
  $ED9E  EE 2D EE  INC SoundCmdOuterLoop
  $EDA1  3E EE 3E  ROL $3EEE,X
  $EDA4  EE 3E EE  INC SoundCmdSkip
  $EDA7  3E EE 3E  ROL $3EEE,X
  $EDAA  EE 3E EE  INC SoundCmdSkip
  $EDAD  4A        LSR 
  $EDAE  EE A6 F4  INC $F4A6
  $EDB1  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EDB3  9D 00 03  STA $0300,X
  $EDB6  A0 00     LDY #$00
  $EDB8  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EDBA  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $EDBC  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EDBE  38        SEC 
  $EDBF  E9 01     SBC #$01
  $EDC1  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EDC3  4C D3 EC  JMP $ECD3

SoundCmdModVolLo6:
  $EDC6  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EDC9  85 FD     STA $FD
  $EDCB  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $EDCD  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EDCF  29 3F     AND #$3F
  $EDD1  05 FD     ORA $FD
  $EDD3  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EDD5  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdModVolHi2:
  $EDD8  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EDDB  85 FD     STA $FD
  $EDDD  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $EDDF  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EDE1  29 C0     AND #$C0
  $EDE3  05 FD     ORA $FD
  $EDE5  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EDE7  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdModVolLo4:
  $EDEA  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EDED  85 FD     STA $FD
  $EDEF  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $EDF1  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EDF3  29 F0     AND #$F0
  $EDF5  05 FD     ORA $FD
  $EDF7  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EDF9  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdSetTimerLo:
  $EDFC  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EDFF  A0 02     LDY #$02
  $EE01  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE03  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdSetTimerHi:
  $EE06  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EE09  A0 04     LDY #$04
  $EE0B  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE0D  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdSetDutyVol:
  $EE10  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EE13  A0 01     LDY #$01
  $EE15  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE17  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdLoopReset:
  $EE1A  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EE1C  A2 02     LDX #$02
  $EE1E  95 F6     STA $F6,X
  $EE20  CA        DEX 
  $EE21  10 FB     BPL $EE1E
  $EE23  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundCmdInnerLoop:
  $EE26  A2 00     LDX #$00
  $EE28  F0 05     BEQ $EE2F

SoundCmdMidLoop:
  $EE2A  A2 01     LDX #$01
  $EE2C  2C A2 02  BIT $02A2
  $EE2F  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EE32  F6 F6     INC $F6,X
  $EE34  D5 F6     CMP $F6,X
  $EE36  D0 12     BNE $EE4A
  $EE38  A9 00     LDA #$00
  $EE3A  95 F6     STA $F6,X
  $EE3C  F0 00     BEQ SoundCmdSkip

SoundCmdSkip:
  $EE3E  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $EE40  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EE42  18        CLC 
  $EE43  69 01     ADC #$01
  $EE45  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE47  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode
  $EE4A  20 63 EE  JSR SoundSeqReadByte
  $EE4D  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $EE4F  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE51  4C 2D ED  JMP SoundSeqDecode

SoundSeqPtrLoad:
  $EE54  A5 F4     LDA $F4 ; SoundSeqPtrLoad: load ptr for slot $F4 from $EEA3 table (2-byte LE) into ZP $F2/$F3
  $EE56  0A        ASL 
  $EE57  AA        TAX 
  $EE58  BD A3 EE  LDA SoundSeqPtrTable,X
  $EE5B  85 F2     STA $F2
  $EE5D  BD A4 EE  LDA $EEA4,X
  $EE60  85 F3     STA $F3
  $EE62  60        RTS 

SoundSeqReadByte:
  $EE63  A5 F4     LDA $F4 ; SoundSeqReadByte: read byte from sequence at ($F2)
  $EE65  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $EE67  B1 F0     LDA ($F0),Y
  $EE69  A8        TAY 
  $EE6A  B1 F2     LDA ($F2),Y
  $EE6C  48        PHA 
  $EE6D  C8        INY 
  $EE6E  98        TYA 
  $EE6F  A0 05     LDY #$05
  $EE71  91 F0     STA ($F0),Y
  $EE73  68        PLA 
  $EE74  60        RTS 
  $EE75  0A        ASL 
  $EE76  A8        TAY 
  $EE77  C8        INY 
  $EE78  68        PLA 
  $EE79  85 FD     STA $FD
  $EE7B  68        PLA 
  $EE7C  85 FE     STA $FE
  $EE7E  B1 FD     LDA ($FD),Y
  $EE80  AA        TAX 
  $EE81  C8        INY 
  $EE82  B1 FD     LDA ($FD),Y
  $EE84  85 FE     STA $FE
  $EE86  86 FD     STX $FD
  $EE88  6C FD 00  JMP ($00FD)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $EE8B–$EEA3 (u16) NotePitchTable
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

NoteFreqTable:
  $EE8B  07 F2     .word $F207  ; 61959 ; NoteFreqTable: 12×2-byte entries (FD=hi
  $EE8D  07 80     .word $8007  ; 32775
  $EE8F  07 14     .word $1407  ; 5127
  $EE91  06 AE     .word $AE06  ; 44550
  $EE93  06 43     .word $4306  ; 17158
  $EE95  05 F4     .word $F405  ; 62469
  $EE97  05 9E     .word $9E05  ; 40453
  $EE99  05 4E     .word $4E05  ; 19973
  $EE9B  05 02     .word $0205  ; 517
  $EE9D  04 BA     .word $BA04  ; 47620
  $EE9F  04 76     .word $7604  ; 30212
  $EEA1  04 36     .word $3604  ; 13828
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $EEA3–$EEDC (ptr16) SoundSeqPtrTable
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

SoundSeqPtrTable:
  $EEA3  D1 EF     .word $EFD1 -> SeqCoin ; SoundSeqPtrTable: 14x2-byte LE ptrs to sound sequence data; indexed by channel/slot id
  $EEA5  DB EE     .word $EEDB -> SeqBGM_Pulse1
  $EEA7  02 EF     .word $EF02 -> SeqBGM_Ch2
  $EEA9  2D EF     .word $EF2D -> SeqBGM_Ch3
  $EEAB  44 F0     .word $F044 -> SeqLifeUpP1
  $EEAD  53 F0     .word $F053 -> SeqLifeUpP2
  $EEAF  BE EF     .word $EFBE
  $EEB1  58 EF     .word $EF58
  $EEB3  7A EF     .word $EF7A
  $EEB5  ED EF     .word $EFED
  $EEB7  A8 EF     .word $EFA8
  $EEB9  99 EF     .word $EF99
  $EEBB  03 F0     .word $F003
  $EEBD  FB EF     .word $EFFB
  $EEBF  0C F0     .word $F00C
  $EEC1  B7 EF     .word $EFB7
  $EEC3  3A F0     .word $F03A
  $EEC5  31 F0     .word $F031
  $EEC7  27 F0     .word $F027
  $EEC9  18 F0     .word $F018
  $EECB  1F F0     .word $F01F
  $EECD  66 F0     .word $F066
  $EECF  84 F0     .word $F084
  $EED1  AF F0     .word $F0AF
  $EED3  E1 F0     .word $F0E1
  $EED5  F4 F0     .word $F0F4
  $EED7  07 F1     .word $F107
  $EED9  DF EF     .word $EFDF

SeqBGM_Pulse1:
  $EEDB  01 81     .word $8101
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $EEDC–$FFFA (code)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  $EEDC  81 7F     STA ($7F,X)
  $EEDE  40        RTI 
  $EEDF  EF 68 1B  ISC $1B68
  $EEE2  2B        ??? 
  $EEE3  33 F0     RLA ($F0),Y
  $EEE5  02        ??? 
  $EEE6  06 33     ASL $33
  $EEE8  43 53     SRE ($53,X)
  $EEEA  F0 02     BEQ $EEEE
  $EEEC  0C 43 53  NOP $5343
  $EEEF  04 F0     NOP $F0
  $EEF1  02        ??? 
  $EEF2  12        ??? 
  $EEF3  5B 0C 1C  SRE $1C0C,Y
  $EEF6  F0 02     BEQ $EEFA
  $EEF8  18        CLC 
  $EEF9  78        SEI 
  $EEFA  1C 68 1C  NOP $1C68,X
  $EEFD  1C 1C 78  NOP $781C,X
  $EF00  1C E8 03  NOP $03E8,X
  $EF03  10 7F     BPL $EF84
  $EF05  08        PHP 
  $EF06  78        SEI 
  $EF07  1A        NOP 
  $EF08  68        PLA 
  $EF09  1A        NOP 
  $EF0A  F1 03     SBC ($03),Y
  $EF0C  07 78     SLO $78
  $EF0E  32        ??? 
  $EF0F  68        PLA 
  $EF10  32        ??? 
  $EF11  F1 03     SBC ($03),Y
  $EF13  0E 78 42  ASL $4278
  $EF16  68        PLA 
  $EF17  42        ??? 
  $EF18  F1 03     SBC ($03),Y
  $EF1A  15 5A     ORA $5A,X
  $EF1C  F1 03     SBC ($03),Y
  $EF1E  19 0B F1  ORA $F10B,Y
  $EF21  03 1D     SLO ($1D,X)
  $EF23  78        SEI 
  $EF24  52        ??? 
  $EF25  68        PLA 
  $EF26  52        ??? 
  $EF27  F1 03     SBC ($03),Y
  $EF29  24 78     BIT $78
  $EF2B  52        ??? 
  $EF2C  E8        INX 

SeqBGM_Ch3:
  $EF2D  02        ??? 
  $EF2E  81 7F     STA ($7F,X)
  $EF30  40        RTI 
  $EF31  78        SEI 
  $EF32  51 68     EOR ($68),Y
  $EF34  51 F2     EOR ($F2),Y
  $EF36  03 07     SLO ($07,X)
  $EF38  78        SEI 
  $EF39  0A        ASL 
  $EF3A  68        PLA 
  $EF3B  0A        ASL 
  $EF3C  F2        ??? 
  $EF3D  03 0E     SLO ($0E,X)
  $EF3F  78        SEI 
  $EF40  1A        NOP 
  $EF41  68        PLA 
  $EF42  1A        NOP 
  $EF43  F2        ??? 
  $EF44  03 15     SLO ($15,X)
  $EF46  32        ??? 
  $EF47  F2        ??? 
  $EF48  03 19     SLO ($19,X)
  $EF4A  42        ??? 
  $EF4B  F2        ??? 
  $EF4C  03 1D     SLO ($1D,X)
  $EF4E  78        SEI 
  $EF4F  3A        NOP 
  $EF50  68        PLA 
  $EF51  3A        NOP 
  $EF52  F2        ??? 
  $EF53  03 24     SLO ($24,X)

  $FFF9  FF 00 D3  ISC NMI,X
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Range $FFFA–$10000 (ptr16) Vectors
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
  $FFFA  00 D3     .word $D300 -> NMI
  $FFFC  70 C0     .word $C070 -> Reset
  $FFFE  70 C0     .word $C070 -> Reset

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; CHR-ROM (16384 bytes)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

; CHR Bank 0 ($0000-$0FFF in PPU space if selected)
  0000  00 00 01 01 41 71 55 7C 00 00 01 01 71 11 77 1F
  0010  5B 7A 5A 7D 5E 77 40 00 7F 1F 7F 1E 77 10 70 00
  0020  00 00 00 00 10 1C D0 3C 00 00 00 00 1C 00 0C C0
  0030  10 9C 90 9C 30 DC 10 00 EC 60 6C 60 CC 00 0C 00
  0040  00 00 01 01 71 51 75 5C 00 00 01 01 41 71 17 7F
  0050  7B 5A 7A 5D 7E 57 30 00 1F 7F 1F 7E 17 70 40 00
  0060  00 00 00 00 1C 10 DC 30 00 00 00 00 10 0C 00 CC
  0070  1C 90 9C 90 3C D0 1C 00 E0 6C 60 6C C0 0C 00 00
  0080  00 0F 05 07 01 03 00 3E 00 0A 0A 0F 01 03 03 3F
  0090  02 02 01 0F 05 05 00 00 01 01 00 08 0A 0A 00 00
  00A0  00 FE 54 FE F8 1C EC 94 00 AA AA FC F0 F8 F8 E8
  00B0  74 0C F8 FE 54 54 00 00 88 F0 00 00 AA AA 00 00
  00C0  00 0F 0A 0F 01 03 00 3E 00 0D 05 07 01 03 03 3F
  00D0  02 02 01 0F 0A 0A 00 00 01 01 00 08 05 05 00 00
  00E0  00 FC AA FE F8 1C EC 94 00 56 54 FC F0 F8 F8 E8
  00F0  74 0C F8 FE AA AA 00 00 88 F0 00 00 54 54 00 00
  0100  00 40 77 54 7B 5A 7A 59 00 70 17 7F 1F 7F 1F 7E
  0110  7C 57 71 41 01 01 00 00 1F 71 11 71 01 01 00 00
  0120  00 10 DC 30 1C 90 9C 90 00 1C C0 CC E0 6C 60 6C
  0130  3C D0 1C 10 00 00 00 00 C0 0C 00 0C 00 00 00 00
  0140  00 70 57 74 5B 7A 5A 79 00 40 77 1F 7F 1F 7F 1E
  0150  5C 77 51 31 01 01 00 00 7F 11 71 41 01 01 00 00
  0160  00 1C D0 3C 10 9C 90 9C 00 10 CC C0 EC 60 6C 60
  0170  30 DC 10 1C 00 00 00 00 CC 00 0C 00 00 00 00 00
  0180  00 7F 2A 3F 0F 30 2E 09 00 55 55 7F 1F 3F 3F 3E

  01A0  00 F0 A0 E0 80 C0 40 7C 00 50 50 F0 80 80 80 FC

  01C0  00 7F 55 7F 0F 30 2E 09 00 6A 2A 3F 1F 3F 3F 3E

  01E0  00 E0 50 F0 80 C0 40 7C 00 B0 A0 E0 80 80 80 FC
  01F0  40 40 80 F0 50 50 00 00 80 80 00 00 A0 A0 00 00
  0200  01 01 01 01 43 7F 4D 6C 01 01 01 01 71 1D 7F 1F
  0210  4B 6A 4A 6A 49 6C 5F 70 7F 1F 7F 1F 7E 1F 70 00
  0220  00 00 00 00 90 FC 70 7C 00 00 00 00 1C 00 8C 80
  0230  30 BC B0 BC B0 7C F0 1C CC 40 4C 40 4C 80 0C 00
  0240  01 01 01 01 33 5F 6D 4C 01 01 01 01 41 7D 1F 7F
